title: NFL/American Football Sports Analysis Editor
description:
1. The Vision

Our project turns fast-paced NFL plays into Digital Coaching Lessons. We don't just show a touchdown; we explain the strategy of both the Offense and the Defense. We want to show the viewers the "Invisible Game"—the secrets that happen before and during the snap.



This account is what you should be trying to copy, but for new plays.





2. The Process

We analyze every part of a single football play. Every video follows this simple structure:



The Setup: We freeze the video at the start. We identify the personnel (e.g., 11 Personnel), the formation, and the defensive alignment.



The Problem: We explain the "Chess Match." What is the offense trying to do? How is the defense trying to stop them?



The Moment: we find the exact second the play is won or lost. This could be a quarterback using his eyes to trick a safety, or a linebacker making a mistake in his "read."



The Result: We show the play finish at full speed to see the result of the strategy.



3. Who We Need

We are looking for a Tactical Expert. You must understand football language like it is your second language.



You See Everything: You can identify coverages (Cover 2, Tampa 2, Quarters) and offensive concepts (RPO, Mesh, Smash) instantly.



You Explain the "Why": You don't just describe what happened; you explain why it happened.



Editor Guidance: you will tell our video editors exactly what to draw on the screen (arrows, circles, and shaded boxes) to highlight the strategy.



4. Our Goal

To create the most intelligent football content on social media. We want to make our audience feel like they are in a private film room with a professional NFL coach.



Summary: This is a deep-dive analysis of NFL film. We break down the offense, the defense, and the "Chess Match" between them to teach the audience how the game is truly played.

title: FULL-TIME AMAZON CREATIVE DESIGNER
description:
MindfulGoods.co · Full-Time · Remote · $1000/mo USD



ABOUT US

MindfulGoods is a specialized Amazon creative agency that helps brands elevate their presence on Amazon through conversion-driven design. We work with some of the tiniest but mightiest brands in the world — and some of the largest household names too. That means whoever joins our team gets to build a portfolio that spans the full spectrum.



We're a 100% remote team living and working across more than eight countries and four time zones. Small team, big impact — that's how we like it.



THE ROLE

The core of this role is catalog scaling. Once master designs are established for a brand, you'll be responsible for adapting and executing those designs efficiently across large SKU catalogs — sometimes dozens or hundreds of product variations. Think of it less like starting from a blank canvas every time, and more like being the person who makes sure every single product in a brand's lineup looks polished, consistent, and on-brand at speed.



This requires real skill: pixel-level precision, fast execution, and the ability to maintain quality across high volumes without cutting corners. The heavy lifting on creative strategy is already done — what we need is someone who can run with a system and deliver at scale.



You'll also work on the full Amazon creative stack — product images, A+ content, and storefronts — so a strong foundation across all three is essential.



If you thrive when you have a strong creative system to work within and take pride in flawless, high-output execution — this role was made for you.



WHAT YOU'LL WORK ON

•?  ?Scaling master designs across large SKU catalogs with speed and precision

•?  ?High-converting product images

•?  ?A+ content and storefront designs

•?  ?Creative revisions across multiple client brands simultaneously

•?  ?Collaborating asynchronously with our strategy and operations team



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

•?  ?4+ years of Amazon-specific design experience (product images, A+, and storefronts — not just general ecommerce)

•?  ?Strong Adobe Photoshop skills — this is non-negotiable

•?  ?Proven ability to work quickly and accurately at high volume without sacrificing quality

•?  ?A portfolio that demonstrates Amazon, ecommerce, or CPG design experience and conversion-focused thinking

•?  ?Excellent attention to detail and ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines

•?  ?Comfortable working independently in a fully async, remote environment

•?  ?Available to overlap some hours with EU time zones



HOW TO APPLY

We don't do cover letters. Instead, we want to see and hear from you directly. 

Please send the requirements to my
: 



Please submit the following:

•?  ?Your portfolio link (Amazon, Ecommerce, or CPG design experience preferred)

•?  ?Your resume or work history

•?  ?*Mandatory: A short Loom video (Loom is free at loom.com) answering these three questions — keep it under 5 minutes total:



  1. Tell us about your Amazon design experience.

  2. Walk us through a listing design you're proud of — what made it convert?

  3. What's your superpower on a team?



Subject line: AMAZON DESIGNER – ONLINEJOBS.PH – [Your Name]

Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.



Disclaimer:

We will only be responding to applicants who feel like a good fit to our team

mber

Key Responsibilities

Identify inaccurate, unverifiable, or outdated negative items

Develop and execute dispute strategies tailored to each client

Draft and submit dispute letters (online and via mail)

Track dispute progress and follow up with bureaus and creditors

Maintain accurate records of all disputes and client communications

Ensure compliance with Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) and other applicable regulations

Monitor results and adjust strategies to maximize deletions

Communicate updates and results clearly with internal teams or clients

Manage and prioritize a high volume of client files efficiently



Qualifications

2+ years of experience in credit repair, specifically dispute processing

Strong understanding of FCRA laws and credit reporting systems

Experience using credit repair software (e.g., Credit Repair Cloud, DisputeFox, or similar)

Excellent written communication skills (for dispute letters)

High attention to detail and organizational skills

Ability to analyze credit reports and identify patterns/issues

Ability to handle sensitive financial data with confidentiality



Preferred Qualifications

Prior experience managing a dispute team

Knowledge of Metro 2 compliance standards

Familiarity with consumer law and debt collection practices

Experience working in a high-volume credit repair environment



Key Skills

Credit report analysis

Dispute strategy development

Compliance and risk awareness

Time management

Problem-solving

Documentation and tracking



KPIs / Performance Metrics

Number of disputes processed per month

Deletion rate of negative items

Turnaround time per client file

Accuracy and compliance rate

Client satisfaction / retention



Compensation

Competitive salary (based on experience)

Performance-based bonuses (based on deletions and efficiency)



Why Join CRF Consultants?

Fast-growing credit repair and financial services company

Opportunity to work with a performance-driven team

Clear growth path into leadership roles

Remote flexibility

title: Odoo Implementation Specialist - remote job
description:
Job Title:

Odoo Implementation Specialist / Consultant (CRM Migration Project – FULLY REMOTE



About the Role:

We are a manufacturing company currently using Zoho CRM and looking to migrate fully to Odoo for better integration with our operations (CRM, sales, inventory, etc.).

We need an experienced Odoo specialist to lead and support the hands-on implementation, data migration from Zoho, configuration, customization (if needed), testing, and user training. This is a critical project requiring someone who can travel internationally and work closely with our team on-site in New Zealand for the core rollout phase.

Key Responsibilities:



Lead the migration of our CRM data and processes from Zoho CRM to Odoo CRM (including leads, opportunities, contacts, pipelines, custom fields, and workflows).

Analyze our current business processes and configure Odoo modules (especially CRM, Sales, and related apps) to match our needs.

Handle data mapping, cleaning, import/export, and validation to ensure zero data loss during migration.

Perform system setup, testing, and troubleshooting during the implementation phase.

Train our team on Odoo usage, best practices, and ongoing maintenance.

Collaborate closely with our internal stakeholders

Provide post-go-live support and recommendations for future optimizations (potential for extended remote contract).



Must-Have Requirements:



Proven hands-on experience with Odoo implementation (at least 2–3 full projects, preferably including CRM migrations or setups).

Strong knowledge of Odoo CRM, Sales, and related modules (v14, v15, v16, v17, or v18 experience preferred).

Experience migrating data from other CRMs (ideally Zoho CRM to Odoo, but similar migrations like Salesforce, HubSpot, etc., accepted).

Fluent in English (excellent written and spoken – you will communicate daily with our NZ team and conduct training sessions).

Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and able to work independently while delivering clear progress updates.



Nice-to-Have (but highly valued):



Odoo functional/technical consultant background (configuration + light customization via Studio or modules).

Experience with Odoo data import tools, ETL processes, or scripts for migration.

Familiarity with other Odoo apps (e.g., Inventory, Accounting, Projects) for potential future expansion.

Previous international project experience or on-site implementations.



What We Offer:



Competitive pay for top talent.



Opportunity for long-term remote collaboration after the on-site phase.

Work with a friendly, supportive team on an exciting system upgrade.

Potential for ongoing Odoo support/maintenance work.



If you're an Odoo expert who thrives on hands-on implementations, loves solving migration challenges, and is open to international travel — we want to hear from you!

Apply now with:



Your updated resume/CV

Links to Odoo projects or references you've worked on

A brief note on your experience with CRM migrations (especially Zoho ? Odoo if any)

Confirmation you're available and willing to travel to New Zealand for 4–8 weeks



We're looking to fill this position quickly — only serious, qualified applicants please.

title: Chat Support for Digital Creator (Remote)
description:
We are looking for a highly organized and personable Sales Representative for a Digital Creator to support subscriber communication, customer relationship management, and revenue-focused chat sales. This is a remote role for someone who is a strong written communicator, can handle multiple conversations at once, and knows how to build rapport while guiding customers toward offers, memberships, and digital products in a natural way.



About the Role



In this position, you will manage inbound and outbound chat-based communication for a digital creator brand. Your focus will be on building strong customer relationships, maintaining a consistent brand voice, and helping increase conversions, retention, and overall customer spend through direct messaging and sales support. The ideal candidate has experience in online sales, customer support, live chat, subscription-based businesses, or creator brands, and understands how to keep conversations engaging, professional, and conversion-focused.



Key Responsibilities



Manage daily chat communication with subscribers, followers, and customers

Respond to inquiries in a timely, professional, and brand-aligned manner

Build rapport with customers and maintain high engagement through written communication

Recommend relevant offers, bundles, promotions, and digital products when appropriate

Support upselling and retention efforts through personalized chat conversations

Follow scripts, SOPs, and brand guidelines while adapting responses naturally

Track customer behavior, common objections, and successful sales approaches

Maintain confidentiality and professionalism in all communications

Collaborate with the internal team to improve scripts, promotions, and customer experience



Requirements



Strong English writing and communication skills

Experience in sales, live chat support, customer service, lead conversion, or digital community management

Ability to manage multiple conversations at once without losing quality

Strong attention to detail and ability to follow instructions closely

Comfortable working independently in a remote environment

Reliable internet connection and laptop/desktop

Available for at least 20 hours per week, with potential for more based on performance

Experience with CRM, subscriber platforms, live chat tools, or creator support tools is a plus

Experience with Infloww



Compensation



Starting pay: $3.50/hour + 3% of net sales

Ongoing contract role

Flexible remote schedule

Performance-based growth opportunities available



Ideal Candidate:



sales-minded but still personable

quick, responsive, and detail-oriented

comfortable working behind the scenes for a creator brand

able to communicate in a way that feels natural, polished, and persuasive

motivated by revenue targets, relationship-building, and performance incentives

title: Sales Manager
description:
The Everyday Cleaners, Seattle, WA. YOUR JOB HUNT STOPS HERE!

Looking to hire ASAP!



We want someone who is:



-Hungry for growth

-High-energy and proactive

-Obsessed with getting results

-Comfortable moving fast and figuring things out

-If you want something easy and predictable, this isn’t it.

-If you want to level up, take ownership, and be part of building something real, keep reading…





So Who Are We?



We’re The Everyday Cleaners—a growing residential cleaning company based in Seattle Washington!

We don’t clean homes ourselves—we build the machine behind it.

We connect customers with reliable cleaners, manage the entire experience, and make sure every job runs smoothly from booking to completion. Think of us as the operations and sales engine that keeps everything moving.

We’re growing quickly and looking for our next A+ tea
mber—someone who’s NOT average, NOT passive, and NOT here to just “do a job.”





Who are we looking for?



We’re looking for a Sales Manager who is Driven, Competitive, and Obsessed with Winning!



This is NOT a role for someone who just wants a job—we want someone with REAL ambition.

Someone who has that “DAWG” in them. You’re hungry, you bring energy every day, and you don’t wait to be told what to do—you make things happen.



The ideal candidate has experience in Sales, preferably within the Cleaning Industry, and is comfortable using tools like BookingKoala (BK), QuoteIQ (Quo), Slack, and Notion. Strong English and sharp communication skills are a must—you know how to control conversations, build trust, and close deals.



You should be goal-oriented and performance-driven, always pushing for better results and never settling for average. We value people who go above and beyond, take ownership, and look for ways to improve systems, processes, and outcomes.

This role is an opportunity to grow fast, sharpen your skills, and be part of a team that actually cares about performance. We’re looking for someone who brings intensity, executes consistently, and adds real value—someone I can learn from as well.





Why Should You Work Here?



This is not a “stable, slow, corporate job.”

This is an opportunity to get in early—before things scale—and be part of building something that’s growing fast.

Right now, we’re small, which means:

You’ll work directly with decision-makers

Your ideas actually matter and get implemented

You can grow as fast as you can prove yourself

As we grow, top performers don’t stay in the same role—they move up into more responsibility, higher pay, and leadership opportunities.





Compensation:



-5 hours per day

-20 hours per week (Wednesday–Sunday, PST)

-$100 USD per week

-Performance-based bonuses for closed deals





Responsibilities



-Close inbound leads and convert them into booked jobs

-Build and improve sales scripts, processes, and workflows

-Generate new business through outbound outreach (cold calls, partnerships, referrals)

-Ensure fast response times—speed is critical in closing deals

-Set accurate pricing and provide profitable quotes based on job scope

-Track performance, manage the CRM, and hit weekly/monthly sales targets

-Continuously test and improve sales strategies to increase revenue





Ideal Requirements:



-Prior experience in Sales for a Cleaning Company.

-Has that DAWG in them, has lots of energy and is excited for the opportunity.

-Strong communication and organizational skills.

-Stable internet connection and reliable laptop/PC

-Someone who goes above and beyond.

-Strong English.





How to Apply:



Please submit:

-A short message explaining why you believe you would be a strong fit for this Sales Manager role, keep it concise and specific.

-Your updated resume

-Applications without a message will not be considered.



Looking forward to connect! 



Best,

John

title: Bilingual Sales Caller & Content Assistant (English/Tagalog) – Senior Care Platform

About MyElderHub

We are a new platform built to make senior care easier for families to navigate. Our model is simple and transparent — no referral fees, ever. Facilities pay a flat monthly subscription to be listed. We are currently in launch phase and growing our provider network across California.

Role Overview

This is a part-time remote role with two main responsibilities:

1. Outbound Sales Calls (Primary)

 • Make cold and warm outreach calls to California RCFE (Residential Care Facility for the Elderly) operators from a provided contact list

2. Content & Marketing Support (Secondary)

 posts,

You Are a Great Fit If You:

 • Speak fluent English and Tagalog

 • Are comfortable speaking with small business owners in a friendly, consultative tone — not high-pressure

 • Can write clearly and professionally in English

 • Are reliable, self-directed, and communicate proactively

Tools We Use

Google Sheets,
, and a VOIP calling app (we will provide or discuss setup)

Hours

Approximately 32 hours/week

title: Experienced B2B Appointment Setter (Cold Caller) For Huge Commission Role ($100-$500)
description:
** PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING **



Hey, I am JT! I am looking for 1-2 hard working appointment setters for my small business. I'm not a big call center where you are just a number. I'm a small business owner and looking for help doing outbound B2B cold calling for me.  I am looking to hire immediately.



I help small business owners with an A.I. Receptionist to answer missed calls and after hours calls. Right now every day I cold call myself and it's been a lot of fun, but as I grow I am looking to outsource this responsibility.



YOUR ROLE:

-- Source your own leads, leads are not provided.

-- Call 80+ small business owners and offer them a free consultation to learn about A.I.

-- Schedule them for a free consultation if they seem interested.

-- That's it! Once they show-up to their appointment, I take over.



REQUIREMENTS (DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE CRITERIA):

-- Experienced B2B Cold Calling and Appointment Setting. This means 100% cold calling — no prior contact, no warm leads.

-- If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or marketing leads, DO NOT APPLY.

-- No heavy accent.

-- You are not someone who relies on your hourly wage, but someone who is motivated by performance and earning more through high commissions.

-- You are a hard worker. You do not call out sick, make excuses, or show-up late.



PAYMENT:

-- $4/hour base 

-- $20 each qualified appointment that shows up

-- 1st monthly sale = $100

-- 2nd monthly sale = $150   ($250 total)

-- 3rd monthly sale = $300   ($550 total)

-- 4th monthly sale = $350    ($900 total)

-- 5th monthly sale = $500    ($1,400 total)



MATH EXAMPLE (At Only 3 Sold + 12 Show-Ups)

-- $320: 20 hours/week at $4/hour

-- $240: 12 show-ups 

-- $550: 3 sold 

-- Total: $1,110/month

-- Most new reps aim for 2-3 per month - that's where you can do very well here.



HOW TO APPLY:

-- Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.

-- Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B.

-- Put "I Love To Dial" as your subject line

-- Copy and paste the following questions and put answers in your application:



1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling B2B and appointment setting (only put jobs that were entirely cold leads....no warm leads, no inbound calls, etc):

2) What product/service were you offering and to who (please be detailed):

3) How many calls per day did you average:

4) How many appointments per week did you average:

5) Did you source your own leads or were you given leads:

6) Do you currently have another job:

7) What is more important to you (a base hourly to be safe, or huge commissions to earn even more money):

title: Klaviyo Specialist
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Content Marketer to own our content strategy across platforms, with a primary focus on
 marketing (Klaviyo) and website (Shopify). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelancer or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is creative, strategic, and detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with designers to improve content performance through clear insights, testing, and audience-focused messaging.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Plan, write, and execute
 campaigns and automated flows in Klaviyo.

- Create and optimize website copy, landing pages, product descriptions, and other on-site content.

- Collaborate with graphic designers to produce visuals aligned with campaigns.

- Analyze
 and website performance metrics to identify what’s working, underperforming content, and opportunities for improvement.

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve content and campaign performance.

- Provide insights and recommendations to improve messaging, tone, and overall content effectiveness.

- Analyze website behavior and implement content-driven CRO strategies to improve conversions on landing pages, product pages, and key funnels.

- Monitor competitors’
s, websites, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC content marketing trends and
 best practices.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Remote position

- Strong writing, editing, and storytelling skills

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret content performance data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain insights to non-technical teammates

- Organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently



Nice To Have (but not required)

- Experience with Klaviyo or other
 marketing platforms

- Experience with Shopify or website analytics

- Experience in content marketing or CRM/CRO for DTC brands

- Familiarity with user behavior analytics, heatmaps, or funnel optimization



What We Offer

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays

- Fully remote work

- Training, upskilling, and career growth opportunities

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: "Klaviyo Specialist – (Your Name)". Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Describe your most recent job: your job overview, and how long did you work there?

2) What challenges did you face, and why did you leave the job?

4) Submit your portfolio. If you don’t have relevant DTC experience, submit your best work. Strong portfolios outside this role may be considered for other roles.

5) Pick one project from the portfolio in question (4) that you are proud of and answer the questions below. You may pick more than one project.

- What was the project?

- Your contribution?

- Why you approached it this way?

- Results (provide metrics if possible)?

title: Digital Marketing Rockstar Wanted! - Digital Marketing Genius / Guru / Specialist
description:
Digital Marketing Rockstar Wanted!



Join a Fast-Growing Multi-Million-Dollar Printing & Apparel Company



We’ve been a powerhouse in the commercial printing industry for over 20 years, and we’re just getting started. What began as a printing shop has evolved into a full-service production hub — offering commercial printing, signage, wraps, screen printing, and sublimation manufacturing. As we celebrate over two decades of success, we’re continuing to expand our reach and our team.



We’re proud to be the largest full-service printing company in our region, delivering high-end print materials and premium sublimated apparel to businesses across the U.S. and beyond. Our success comes from a tight-knit culture built on creativity, hard work, professionalism, and fun — and now, we’re building that same amazing culture in the Philippines with a growing remotWho We’re Looking For



We’re on the hunt for a Creative Digital Marketing Genius — someone who can conceptualize, create, and launch powerful visual campaigns that stop the scroll, grab attention, and drive action.



Not just a social media manager — a true digital marketer who understands the art and science of conversion. You know how to craft scroll-stopping videos, killer graphics, and dynamic ads that build brand love and generate sales.



Your creative work will fuel our marketing across:



Social Media (Meta, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, etc.)



Paid Ad Campaigns



Website Visuals



 & SMS Marketing



What You’ll Do



Create eye-catching video ads, motion graphics, and static creatives for social media and paid campaigns.



Design web and
 marketing visuals — banners, promo layouts, product highlights, and more.



Assist in setting up and optimizing paid ad campaigns (Meta, TikTok, etc.).



Help craft and execute
/SMS campaigns (Mailchimp, Klaviyo, or similar).



What You Need



4+ years of hands-on experience in digital content creation, social media design, and ad deployment.



Strong skills in Canva, Adobe Photoshop/Illustrator, and video tools like CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar.



Experience using Meta Ads Manager and TikTok Ads platforms.



Up-to-date understanding of social media trends and high-converting ad formats (Reels, Shorts, TikToks).



Working knowledge of
/SMS marketing and audience targeting.



Excellent attention to detail, creativity, and time management skills.



How to Apply



Apply directly through this post — do not
.



Include the following:



A short video of you speaking English (so we can hear your pronunciation).



A link to your updated resume (PDF).



A link to your portfolio — show us your best ad videos, graphics, or campaigns.



A short note about a campaign or post you’re most proud of — and tell us why it worked.

Excellent communication skills both verbal and written.

Proven ability to thrive in a fast-paced team environment that requires multi-tasking and the ability to gain trust with customers very quickly.

title: Sales Representative for Digital Creator (Remote)
description:
We are looking for a highly organized and personable Sales Representative for a Digital Creator to support subscriber communication, customer relationship management, and revenue-focused chat sales. This is a remote role for someone who is a strong written communicator, can handle multiple conversations at once, and knows how to build rapport while guiding customers toward offers, memberships, and digital products in a natural way.



About the Role



In this position, you will manage inbound and outbound chat-based communication for a digital creator brand. Your focus will be on building strong customer relationships, maintaining a consistent brand voice, and helping increase conversions, retention, and overall customer spend through direct messaging and sales support. The ideal candidate has experience in online sales, customer support, live chat, subscription-based businesses, or creator brands, and understands how to keep conversations engaging, professional, and conversion-focused.



Key Responsibilities



Manage daily chat communication with subscribers, followers, and customers

Respond to inquiries in a timely, professional, and brand-aligned manner

Build rapport with customers and maintain high engagement through written communication

Recommend relevant offers, bundles, promotions, and digital products when appropriate

Support upselling and retention efforts through personalized chat conversations

Track customer behavior, common objections, and successful sales approaches

Maintain confidentiality and professionalism in all communications

Collaborate with the internal team to improve scripts, promotions, and customer experience



Requirements



Strong English writing and communication skills

Experience in sales, live chat support, customer service, lead conversion, or digital community management

Ability to manage multiple conversations at once without losing quality

Strong attention to detail and ability to follow instructions closely

Comfortable working independently in a remote environment

Reliable internet connection and laptop/desktop

Available for at least 20 hours per week, with potential for more based on performance

Experience with CRM, subscriber platforms, live chat tools, or creator support tools is a plus

Experience with Infloww



Compensation



Starting pay: $3.50/hour + 3% of net sales

Ongoing contract role

Flexible remote schedule

Performance-based growth opportunities available



Ideal Candidate:



sales-minded but still personable

quick, responsive, and detail-oriented

comfortable working behind the scenes for a creator brand

able to communicate in a way that feels natural, polished, and persuasive

motivated by revenue targets, relationship-building, and performance incentives

title: Administrative Director
description:
About the Role



NOTE: This role requires 12pm-8pm Eastern Standard Time hours, Monday-Friday.



We are seeking a highly capable, organized, and detail-oriented Administrative Director to own and manage the day-to-day administrative operations for a growing multi-location franchise education business in the U.S.



This is not a basic VA role — you will act as the primary administrative lead across communication flow, center support, operational follow-through, vendor coordination, recurring admin processes, and internal tracking systems. Your role is to keep the business organized, responsive, and running smoothly as we scale.



Key Responsibilities



Administrative Operations

Own daily administrative coordination across multiple stakeholders, including leadership, managers, landlords, vendors, and support channels

Monitor and triage shared inboxes, support requests, and communication channels

Review support logs and ensure issues are resolved or assigned to the right tea
mber

Maintain strong follow-through on recurring operational tasks and open items



Center & Field Support

Support center teams with day-to-day administrative needs

Help monitor center-related issues, escalate when needed, and track resolution

Assist with recurring center operations tasks such as cameras, supply coordination, utilities tracking, and support workflows

Coordinate special requests and help ensure centers receive timely support



Vendor & Account Coordination

Coordinate with vendors and service providers on administrative and operational matters

Help manage accounts such as Amazon Business, internet providers, virtual mailbox, vehicles, and other recurring business services

Track renewals, budgets, and administrative follow-up items

Investigate chargebacks and support issue resolution with relevant stakeholders



Supplies & Purchasing Support

Coordinate standard and special supply requests across locations

Support batch ordering of branded items, reward items, and employee/center supplies

Help maintain organized purchasing and fulfillment workflows

Track budgets and recurring ordering cycles



Reporting & Tracking

Maintain and update internal trackers, spreadsheets, and scorecards

Update KPI scorecards and recurring admin reporting tools

Track mail, utilities, support issues, and other operational items with accuracy

Provide clear status updates and ensure information is easy for leadership to review



Meetings & Coordination

Attend and support recurring meetings, including leadership/admin meetings and team office hours

Help organize quarterly in-person sessions and other recurring coordination events

Capture follow-ups and help ensure action items are completed



Process & Systems Improvement

Build and document clear SOPs for recurring admin workflows

Improve systems and organization to reduce missed items, bottlenecks, and communication overload

Bring structure, consistency, and operational discipline to the admin function



Ideal Candidate Profile

4+ years experience in administrative operations, operations coordination, executive admin, or business support roles

Experience supporting U.S.-based businesses required

Extremely organized with strong attention to detail

Excellent spoken and written English and professional communication skills

Able to manage many moving pieces without dropping details

Proactive, dependable, and strong at follow-through

Comfortable working independently and driving tasks to completion with minimal oversight

Strong Google Sheets / spreadsheet comfort required



Nice to Have

Experience supporting multi-location businesses, franchise businesses, or field operations

Experience coordinating vendors, recurring admin workflows, and operational trackers

Familiarity with tools like Google Workspace, shared inboxes, virtual mail systems, Amazon Business, and task trackers

Experience building SOPs and improving administrative processes

Comfort working in a fast-moving, growing business environment

title: YouTube Video Editor (Engagement-Focused)
description:
Part-Time | 2 Videos Per Week | Long-Term Opportunity



We are looking for a skilled YouTube Video Editor who understands how to create engaging, clean, and professional content that keeps viewers watching.



This is not just a basic editing role. We are looking for someone who understands pacing, storytelling, and viewer retention, and can take raw footage and turn it into a polished, high-quality video.



You will work closely with the creator to bring content to life and help improve overall video performance.



What You’ll Be Editing

Educational and business-focused YouTube videos

Talking-head style content with teaching, tips, and strategies

Videos typically range from 10–20 minutes



Key Responsibilities

1. Video Editing (Core Role)

Edit 2 YouTube videos per week

Cut out filler words, pauses, and unnecessary content

Maintain strong pacing to keep viewer attention

Ensure clean, professional final output



2. Engagement Optimization

Add subtle zooms, cuts, and movement to avoid static visuals

Use text overlays to highlight key points

Incorporate on-screen elements (bullet points, callouts, emphasis text)

Help strengthen the flow and structure of the video



3. Video Structure Support

Ensure a strong and engaging beginning (hook)

Create smooth transitions between sections

Maintain clarity and flow throughout

Support a clear and strong ending or call-to-action



4. Branding & Consistency

Follow brand guidelines (fonts, colors, style)

Maintain a clean and consistent editing style across videos

Keep visuals aligned with a professional, educational brand



5. Optional (Preferred but Not Required)

Cut 2–5 short clips per video for social media (Reels/Shorts)



What We Are Looking For

Strong understanding of YouTube editing and viewer retention

Ability to create engaging but not overly distracting edits

Good sense of pacing, timing, and flow

Attention to detail and quality

Ability to take feedback and improve quickly

Reliable and able to meet deadlines



Required Tools & Skills



Proficiency in at least one:

Adobe Premiere Pro

Final Cut Pro

CapCut (advanced users)



Basic understanding of YouTube content structure and engagement

Ability to export high-quality videos optimized for YouTube



Bonus Qualifications

Experience editing for YouTube creators or online educators

Basic motion graphics (After Effects or similar)

Understanding of YouTube analytics and retention strategies



Workload & Compensation

2 videos per week

Pay: $40–$80 per video (based on experience and quality)

Opportunity for increased workload and long-term growth



How to Apply



Please submit the following:



A short introduction about yourself

Links to 2–3 YouTube videos you have edited

A brief explanation of your editing style

Answer this question:

“How do you keep viewers engaged throughout a YouTube video?”



Important:

Include the word ENGAGING in your application subject line.



We are looking for someone who takes pride in their work and wants to grow with a brand long-term.

title: Marketing Operations Assistant
description:
About Us & Your Role

We’re building and scaling high-velocity DTC brands.

The pace is fast. The standards are high. The upside is massive.

We’re hiring a Marketing Operations Assistant to become the executional backbone of the marketing team.



You’ll own the systems that keep everything running:

- Ad scheduling

- Tracking sheets

- Reporting

- Comment extraction

- Day-to-day marketing operations

- You’ll also take on new initiatives and ad hoc projects:

- UGC sourcing & coordination

- Influencer outreach

- Competitor research

- One-off high-priority projects

- Anything that falls outside a clear owner — you take it and run with it.

- You’ll work directly with our Head of Meta, acting as their right-hand.



The goal is simple: Take things off their plate. Execute them fully. 



We’re looking for someone who:

- Figures things out

- Moves fast

- Solves problems

- Improves systems

I

f you’re organized, resourceful, and take pride in being the person who gets things done without being chased — you’ll thrive here.

If you need constant direction, prefer predictable work, or move slowly — this won’t be the right fit.



We’re building something rare.

If you want in, let’s talk.



Key Responsibilities

- Own and manage the day-to-day marketing operations — ensuring core systems like ad scheduling, tracking, reporting, and comment extraction run smoothly and on time.

- Build and own the UGC and influencer pipeline from scratch — sourcing creators, managing outreach, coordinating deliverables, and turning it into a repeatable, scalable system.

- Execute high-priority and ad hoc projects end-to-end — taking ideas or tasks and fully running with them without needing constant direction.

- Conduct ongoing competitor and market research — identifying new creative angles, trends, and insights to support the marketing team.

- Support campaign execution on Meta — assisting with launches, adjustments, and resolving operational issues when needed.

- Coordinate across the marketing team to ensure projects, deliverables, and campaigns move forward without delays or breakdowns.

- Identify inefficiencies and improve workflows — finding ways to make processes faster, cleaner, and more reliable, including leveraging AI or automation where applicable.



Requirements

- 3+ years of experience in an operations, marketing, or execution-focused role (e-commerce or DTC experience is a strong plus).

- Highly resourceful and able to figure things out independently without step-by-step instructions.

- Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple tasks, systems, and priorities at once.

- High attention to detail — able to catch small errors and maintain accuracy across tasks, data, and deliverables.

- Fast executor — able to move quickly, handle high workload, and complete tasks without unnecessary delays.

- Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to accelerate workflows, research, and problem-solving.

- Clear and responsive communicator — able to work effectively with different team members and keep things moving.



Why Us

- High-Growth Environment: We’re scaling fast, and as we grow, so will your role. There’s real opportunity to take on more responsibility and evolve beyond a typical “assistant” position.

- Massive Learning: You’ll work across multiple areas of marketing — operations, UGC, campaigns, systems, and more —gaining hands-on experience that most roles don’t offer.

Performance Incentives: Your impact won’t go unnoticed. High performers are rewarded based on output and contribution.

Real Impact: Your work directly affects how fast and how efficiently we scale. You won’t be doing busy work — what you do matters immediately.

High-Performance Culture: You’ll work alongside a team that moves fast, takes ownership, and holds a high standard across everything.



Interested? Apply below:

title: 2D Character Illustrator & Rigger
description:
Description

We are looking for a skilled 2D illustrator and character rigger to work on an existing set of stylized characters for a mobile app. You will take existing PNG character designs and redraw them in multiple expressions, poses, and outfit variants — then rig them to support a layered digital asset system where individual items like clothing, accessories, and skins can be swapped in and out programmatically.



Skills Required

Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator and/or Figma for vector character work is required, along with solid experience in 2D character rigging using Spine2D, DragonBones, Adobe Animate, or a comparable tool. You should be comfortable working within an established flat vector style and matching an existing aesthetic precisely across multiple characters. Experience delivering assets for mobile apps is required. A background in video game character art, game UI/UX, or game asset pipelines is a strong plus, as is familiarity with Lottie/BodyMovin for animation export or experience designing layered avatar and costume systems.



Deliverables

You will deliver each character redrawn in a minimum of six expression and pose variants, along with accessory and skin designs scoped per milestone. All characters must be fully rigged with swappable asset layers and exported in a format ready for iOS integration — sprite sheets, PNGs, or Lottie JSON as agreed. Clean layered source files (AI or PSD) are required for all deliverables.



How to Apply

Please share a portfolio link or samples showing character illustration, expression sheets, or rigged 2D work. Include your preferred rigging tool, a brief note on your mobile app and game asset experience, and your rate with an estimated turnaround for an initial milestone.

title: Remote Interior Designer – Japanese Restaurant & Café Concept
description:
About the Opportunity:

We are seeking a talented and detail-oriented Interior Designer to collaborate remotely on the design and execution of a traditional Japanese-inspired restaurant and café concept in the United States. This role is ideal for a designer who can thoughtfully translate authentic Japanese design principles into a functional, buildable space using materials and vendors accessible within the U.S.



The designer will play a key role in shaping the visual identity, guest experience, and overall atmosphere—while coordinating closely with ownership, architects, and contractors throughout the project lifecycle.

-Source furniture, fixtures, lighting, and materials available within the United States

-Collaborate remotely with architects, contractors, and vendors to ensure design accuracy and feasibility

-Ensure design plans align with U.S. building codes, ADA requirements, and local regulations

-Support budgeting by recommending cost-effective alternatives when necessary

-Provide remote oversight and guidance during implementation and installation phases

-Participate in virtual meetings and maintain consistent communication with the project team



Qualifications:

-Minimum of 5 years of professional interior design experience, preferably in hospitality (restaurants, cafés, boutique spaces)

-Bachelor’s degree or higher in Interior Design, Architecture, or a related field

-Strong portfolio showcasing completed design projects (hospitality experience preferred)

-Knowledge or appreciation of traditional Japanese design principles is highly preferred

-Experience sourcing materials and furnishings within the U.S. market

-Proficiency in design software (AutoCAD, SketchUp, Revit, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar)

-Strong understanding of space planning, lighting, and customer experience flow

-Ability to manage timelines, vendors, and deliverables in a remote work environment

-Excellent communication and presentation skills



Scope of Work / Deliverables:

-Concept development and design direction

-Floor plans and layout recommendations

-2D/3D renderings and visual presentations

-FF&E sourcing lists with vendor details

-Material and finish specifications

-Coordination support during design execution



Preferred Attributes:

-Strong attention to detail and ability to execute a cohesive design vision remotely

-Ability to balance creativity with practicality, budget, and timelines

-Experience designing culturally inspired or concept-driven spaces

-Self-motivated and highly organized



Compensation:

-Compensation will be based on experience and project scope, structured as a contract agreement.



Application Requirements:

-Professional resume

-Portfolio of interior design work (hospitality projects preferred)

-Copy of diploma or proof of degree

-Three (3) professional references



Please send your resume and portfolio to

salary: Will be based on experience and project

title: Shopify Ecommerce Tech Stack Developer
description:

We’re now looking to bring in a hands-on developer to own and evolve this ecosystem, with a strong emphasis on AI automation, system integration and scalability.



This is not a theme-tweaker role. You’ll be designing workflows, removing manual work, and building smart automation that actually moves the business forward.



The Role

Automation first



Data flowing once, correctly



Reducing manual operations across marketing, support and fulfilment



Using AI where it makes real commercial sense

Shopify

If you are hungry, detail-oriented, and love the thrill of finding a diamond in the rough, we want you.



The Mission



Your goal is to turn "Raw Data" into "Qualified Opportunities." You will be the front line of our acquisitions team, ensuring our Reps only talk to the most motivated sellers.



What You’ll Be Doing Every Day:



• Lead Scrubbing: Filtering raw lists to identify high-motivation targets (Probate, Foreclosure, Vacant).

• Initial Outreach: Managing initial SMS/Cold Call campaigns to gauge interest.

• Qualifying: Using the "4 Pillars" to screen sellers (Motivation, Property Condition, Timeline, and Asking Price).

• CRM Management: Keeping our CRM organized and updated with surgical precision.

• Nurturing: Managing follow-up tasks so no deal ever falls through the cracks.



What We’re Looking For:



• Real Estate Experience: Minimum 1–2 years working with US-based real estate investors.

• Tech Savvy: Expert-level knowledge of PropStream, BatchDialer/SmarterContact, and CRM systems.

• Fluent English: You must be able to hold a natural, high-level conversation with US sellers.

• Problem Solver: You don't just report problems; you find solutions.

• "The Hunter Mentality": You understand that every "No" brings us closer to a goal.



Compensation & Perks



We believe in rewarding the people who help us win.



Component                                               Rate

Base Pay                                                      $5.00  USD/hour

Qualified Lead Bonus                                     $20.00 per lead accepted by our Rep

Closed Deal Bonus                                     $250.00 per deal closed/assigned



• Growth Path: Opportunities to move into an Acquisitions Manager role as the company grows.

• Training: Direct access to our proprietary "Mogul Framework" and deal-analysis tools.



How to Apply

To prove you have the attention to detail we need, please reply with:

1. A 1-minute voice recording introducing yourself (Vocaroo link).

2. One sentence on why you love real estate.





Include the word "GEORGIA" in your subject line so we know you read this.

title: DTC/E-commerce Video Editor - UGC & AI Ads (Remote, Freelance)
description:
Creative studio specializing in ugly, native ads for DTC brands on Meta is looking for a performance-driven video editor who understands that every cut, caption, and frame exists to convert — not to look pretty. You'll be editing raw UGC creator footage and building AI-powered ads across multiple client accounts. This is not a generic editing role. You're editing ads that need to stop the scroll, hold attention, and drive purchases. If you've never thought about how your editing decisions affect thumb stop rates, hold rates, and CPAs, this isn't the right fit.



???? What you'll be doing



? Cutting raw UGC footage into final Meta ads (hooks, B-roll inserts, captions, pacing)

? Building AI voiceover ads using ElevenLabs over stock footage or AI-generated visuals

? Creating AI video content using Runway, Kling, Sora, or similar tools

? Editing 15-25+ creatives per month across multiple client accounts

? Working from detailed briefs with creative direction and pacing notes

? Exporting vertical 9:16 optimized for Meta placements

? Iterating on winners — new hooks on proven bodies, format swaps, creator swaps



? What you need



? Proven experience editing DTC or e-commerce ads that ran on Meta or TikTok with real spend behind them

? A portfolio of ads that actually performed — bonus if you can share metrics

? Understanding of direct response fundamentals: hooks, hold rates, CTRs, CPAs

? Proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

? Familiarity with AI tools — ElevenLabs, Runway, Kling, Sora, Midjourney, or similar. Don't need to master all of them but must be comfortable with AI in your workflow and willing to learn fast

? Clean burned-in captions that match spoken audio

? An instinct for what makes an ad look native vs. what makes it look like a commercial

? Self-driven — you take the brief, you deliver, you flag issues early without being asked



???? What you don't need



? Motion graphics or After Effects expertise (we don't make polished ads)

? A film degree

? 10 years of experience — if you've been editing DTC ads for 6 months and your work converts, that matters more than a decade of irrelevant work



? Bonus



? You've built ugly static ads in Canva

? You understand Meta's Andromeda system and why visual diversity matters for delivery

? You've worked directly with UGC creators and know what good raw footage looks like

? You're plugged into the DTC ad space — you follow the accounts, study the ads, know what's working right now



???? The details



? Remote, freelance/contract

? Flexible hours but must hit weekly deadlines consistently

? Paid per deliverable, not hourly

? Payment within 48 hours of approved delivery

? Opportunity to grow into a full-time role as the studio scales



???? How to apply



D
 with:

1?? A link to 3-5 ads you edited that ran as paid media (not spec work — real ads with real spend)

2?? One sentence on what makes a UGC ad convert

3?? Which AI tools you've used and how



No cover letters. No resumes. Just show the work.

title: Media Project Manager
description:
About Us



Mission First Media is a real estate media company specializing in high-quality listing content, including photography, video, and social media reels. We help agents present their listings professionally and stand out online.



We’re hiring a Media Project Manager to take ownership of our photo and video workflow—ensuring projects are organized, edited correctly, and delivered at a high standard.

• Review edited videos for quality control (QC)

Video QC includes:

• Correct clip order and structure

• Proper use of labeled footage

• Smooth pacing and flow

• Missing or incorrect clips

• Color/exposure consistency



Photo QC includes:

• Exposure and brightness consistency

• Color accuracy and white balance

• Straight lines and proper verticals

• Image clarity and sharpness

• Removal of distractions or editing errors



• Coordinate revisions with editors

• Track project timelines and ensure on-time delivery

• Deliver final media to clients



Requirements:



• Experience working with video editing, photo editing, or media production workflows

• Strong attention to detail (especially with file organization and QC)

• Ability to follow structured instructions and apply them accurately

Preferred Experience:

• Familiarity with tools like Google Drive, Dropbox,

What Success Looks Like:



• Files are consistently organized, labeled, and editor-ready

• Editors clearly understand project structure without confusion

• Videos and photos pass QC with minimal revisions

• Projects are delivered on time and without errors



What We Offer:

• Opportunity to grow into a larger operations role

title: Senior Operations Agent (Remote – Full Time, High Ownership Role)
description:
We’re hiring a Senior Operations Agent to run critical parts of our operations.



This is not a basic VA job.



You are responsible for making sure orders get executed — even when things go wrong.



If you’re fast, resourceful, and know how to work people to get things done, you’ll thrive here.





About Us



We are a U.S.-based waste management company providing dumpster rentals and site services nationwide.



We’re a lean, high-performance team. We win by moving faster, solving problems better, and building strong vendor relationships.





What This Role Actually Is



Our system is evolving quickly.



Basic tasks are being automated.



That means your job is focused on what can’t be automated:



* Solving real-time problems

* Calling vendors immediately to secure availability

* Negotiating pricing, timing, and service outcomes

* Building relationships so vendors prioritize our jobs

* Handling edge cases and exceptions

* Making decisions without waiting



You will not be speaking with customers.



You will be working directly with vendors (“dispatch”) and internally with the team.







What Success Looks Like



* You get vendors to say “yes” when others can’t

* You negotiate better outcomes (price, timing, service)

* Vendors recognize your name and respond quickly

* Orders get handled fast and correctly

* Problems are solved before they escalate

* The team trusts you to take full ownership





Core Responsibilities



* Place and manage orders (delivery, pickup, swaps, relocations)

* Call vendors to confirm availability and push for faster timelines

* Negotiate pricing, fees, and service terms when needed

* Build and maintain strong vendor relationships over time

* Proactively solve issues (delays, missed jobs, conflicts)

* Keep all job records accurate and updated

* Coordinate with the internal team to keep everything aligned

* Handle exceptions that automation cannot



This role involves constant phone work, negotiation, and fast decision-making.





Work Schedule (Strict Requirement)



* Monday–Friday

* 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST

* 1-hour lunch + two 15-minute breaks



If you cannot consistently work this schedule, do not apply.



?



Compensation



* Base: $7/hour (starting)

* Performance-based bonuses with real upside



High performers can increase total monthly compensation by 40–50%+.



Bonuses are tied to:



* Reliability and responsiveness

* Operational performance

* Team results and execution



This is designed so people who take ownership and perform get paid more.  





Non-Negotiables (Read Carefully)



Do not apply if any of the below are not true:



* You are comfortable making phone calls frequently

* You can negotiate confidently and push for better outcomes

* You respond quickly and follow up consistently

* You think independently and make decisions

* You are reliable and show up on time every day

* You pay attention to detail and avoid careless mistakes





Ideal Candidate Traits



* Fast thinker and fast executor

* Strong communicator (clear, confident English)

* Comfortable negotiating and handling pushback

* Builds relationships naturally

* Highly organized and detail-oriented

* Proactive and solution-focused

* Calm under pressure





Bonus Points



* Operations, logistics, or dispatch experience

* Experience negotiating with vendors or suppliers

* Experience in dumpster rental or waste management

* Strong Google Sheets / CRM experience





Application Instructions (Important – Read Carefully)



To be considered, follow these steps exactly:



1. Subject Line



Start your application with:

“Fast Operator – [Your Name]”



2. Include a 2–3 Minute Video



Record a short video answering:



* Why you’re a good fit for this role

* A time you had to negotiate or push someone to get a result

* How you build relationships with vendors or partners



3. Answer These Questions



1. Describe a time you negotiated a better outcome (price, timing, or service). What was your approach?

2. Tell me about a time you had to act quickly without full information. What did you do?

3. Describe a mistake you made at work. What happened and how did you handle it?

4. What does “ownership” mean to you in this role?

5. What backup plans do you have for internet or power outages?







Final Note



This role is about getting things done through other people.



Not just sending messages — but pushing, following up, and building relationships so things happen faster and better over time.



If you’re strong at that, you’ll stand out very quickly.

title: Head of CRM & Retention
description:
Role Overview

Elevator Goods (
) is a portfolio of fast-growing consumer brands (FluffCo, Jiggies, Notorious Cookware) and the infrastructure behind them. We move fast, we care about world-class execution, and we’re looking for someone who can own retention across the entire ecosystem.



You will own CRM, lifecycle, and retention strategy across all EG brands. This is a hands-on, high-impact role: you’ll be in Klaviyo daily, architecting automations, rolling out segmentation, and executing campaigns that drive repeat purchases and higher LTV. You’ll work closely with brand, creative, and growth to build a cohesive marketing calendar and ensure campaigns ship on time and with intention.



Key Responsibilities



Strategy & Leadership

- Own the CRM & retention roadmap across FluffCo, Jiggies, and Notorious Cookware 
, SMS, site capture, post-purchase, loyalty initiatives).

- Build, refine, and scale lifecycle automations that directly improve LTV and repeat purchase rate.

- Set quarterly retention KPIs and actively monitor performance.

- Lead segmentation strategy and customer cohort analysis.



Execution (Hands-On Klaviyo)

- Build and deploy all campaigns and flows across
/SMS.

- Maintain list hygiene, deliverability, and compliance.

- Continuously test subject lines, CTAs, layouts, send times, and segmentation.

- Implement advanced flows (browse abandon, cross-sell, replenishment, VIP, winback, RFM-based journeys).



Creative & Brand Integration

- Partner with our in-house creative studio to brief + develop strong storytelling assets.

- Convert the marketing calendar into weekly CRM deliverables.

- Ensure all communications match brand voice, aesthetic, and product priorities.

- Collaborate with brand leads on launch plans, promotional events, and evergreen campaigns.



Data, Performance & Optimization

- Own dashboards for retention metrics: LTV, RPR, churn, active subscriber growth, deliverability, revenue from flows/campaigns.

- Partner with ops on inventory-aligned
 planning and opportunities based on stock levels

- Identify drop-off points in the customer journey and implement fixes.

- Analyze customer behavior patterns and run insights for product and growth teams.



Cross-Functional Collaboration

- Work with media buyers to align CRM triggers with paid funnels.

- Support Shopify CRO initiatives through onsite messaging & popup optimization.

- Liaise with customer service for feedback loops and reputation management.



What Success Looks Like

- Increasing LTV across all three brands.

- Higher contribution to revenue from automated flows vs. campaigns.

- Better retention across key cohorts (new customers, subscription, VIP).

- Crisp execution: campaigns go out on time, on brand, and drive revenue.

- A stable and scalable CRM infrastructure that can support new brand launches.

title: Operations Manager
description:
Overview

We are a fast-growing "better-for-you" snack brand redefining indulgence with clean-label candied nuts and organic dried fruit. We are scaling quickly across retail, distribution, and e-commerce and are building the operational backbone to support that growth.



This is a high-ownership operations role with a direct impact on revenue. You will ensure product moves efficiently from production to shelf while continuously improving how the business operates. This role is for a problem-solver who moves fast and defaults to automation over manual work.



Key Responsibilities

Order Execution & Fulfillment

Own the end-to-end purchase order flow across retail, wholesale, and e-commerce channels.

Ensure all orders are processed, shipped, and delivered accurately and on time.

Manage critical documentation, including invoices, BOLs, routing guides, and labels.

Proactively resolve fulfillment issues before they impact the customer experience.



Sales Operations & Account Readiness

Support new item setups across various retailers and distributors.

Maintain accurate pricing, product data, and sales materials.

Track deductions, trade spend, and promotional activity.

Ensure operational readiness for all new accounts and upcoming product launches.



Supply Chain & Inventory Management

Coordinate production runs directly with co-packers and suppliers.

Manage inventory across warehouses and major distributors, such as UNFI and KeHE.

Monitor stock levels to prevent out-of-stocks or excess inventory.

Track inbound and outbound shipments, resolving any delays immediately.



Systems & AI Automation

Identify inefficiencies and implement scalable systems to improve speed and accuracy.

Use AI tools to automate repetitive tasks across reporting and order management.

Build processes that improve visibility and replace manual work with scalable solutions.



Required Skills & Experience

3–5+ years in operations, supply chain, or logistics.

Experience within the US CPG ecosystem, ideally working with distributors like UNFI or KeHE.

Strong systems mindset with comfort in ERPs, CRMs, spreadsheets, and AI productivity tools.

High attention to detail, ability to move quickly, and capacity to operate independently.



To Apply:

Please send your resume and short loom intro video via messages. Thanks!

title: Accountant- NIGHT SHIFT
description:

About the Role



As a Staff Accountant, your main responsibilities are to lead and support the finance team through training and coaching, manage daily accounting operations, ensure accurate reconciliation of financial records, and prepare key financial reports. You will also assist with budgeting and forecasting, support month- and year-end closings, ensure regulatory compliance—including tax filings across multiple jurisdictions—and collaborate with external auditors during audits.

Assist with budgeting, forecasting, and financial analysis activities.

Ensure compliance with accounting standards, internal controls, and company policies.

Competencies and Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

Minimum 5 years of accounting experience in a similar role.

Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial reporting standards.

Proficiency in NetSuite and Microsoft Excel is required.

Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and organizational skills.

Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple priorities.

Effective communication and collaboration skills.

Analytical Skills: Ability to identify and resolve discrepancies in billing and account receivable records

Familiarity with corporate accounting practices



Nice-to-Have





Having familiarity with corporate accounting practices

Experience working with US Clients and Retail companies

Experience in multi-jurisdictional tax compliance (U.S. sales tax, GST, VAT).

Ability to use Excel for data analysis, financial modeling, and reporting

What We Offer

title: Head of Podcast & YouTube Growth Strategy
description:
She’s Making Millions is a fast-growing podcast and media brand for ambitious women building 6 - 7 figure businesses. Hosted by international speaker and entrepreneur Taylor Victoria, the show shares real conversations about scaling companies, creating wealth, and stepping into leadership.



Our mission is to help 1 million women build million-dollar businesses.



We are hiring a strategic growth lead who knows how to turn strong podcast content into serious audience growth, with a major focus on YouTube SEO, discoverability, click-through rate, watch-time, and long-term channel performance.



This is a strategy and growth role for someone who deeply understands how YouTube works, how podcast content gets discovered, and how to optimise every episode so it has the best possible chance of ranking, being clicked, being watched, and driving binge behaviour.



Role Overview



You will own the growth of our podcast and YouTube channel.



Your core responsibility is to make sure every episode is positioned to perform.



That includes:

increasing downloads, subscribers, watch-time, retention, and click-through rates

leading YouTube SEO strategy across every episode

crafting high-performing titles and thumbnail briefs

improving visibility through search, suggested content, and browse traffic

analysing performance data and making smart recommendations weekly

working closely with the producer and content team to improve packaging and growth



Key Responsibilities

YouTube SEO and discoverability

Develop and execute a clear YouTube growth strategy with strong SEO foundations

Research keywords, topics, search behaviour, and competitor content to improve discoverability

Optimise every episode for YouTube search, suggested videos, and browse traffic

Write or guide SEO-informed titles that balance discoverability with clickability

Create detailed thumbnail briefs designed to improve CTR

Optimise descriptions, chapters, playlists, metadata, and internal linking

Identify opportunities to improve ranking, visibility, and long-tail traffic over time



Episode packaging and performance

Ensure every episode is packaged for performance before publishing

Strengthen hooks, structure, titles, and thumbnail direction to improve watch-time and retention

Make sure each episode becomes a binge-worthy content asset, not just a one-off upload

Recommend improvements to intros, episode flow, and content positioning based on data



Growth and distribution

Build and execute a 12-month podcast and YouTube growth strategy

Develop promotional plans for each episode across YouTube, Shorts, Instagram Reels, and LinkedIn

Collaborate with guests and the team to increase episode sharing and reach

Help drive more consistent audience growth across both podcast and YouTube platforms



Analytics and reporting

Track performance across YouTube and podcast platforms

Review CTR, watch-time, retention, subscriber growth, traffic sources, and downloads

Run weekly tests and recommend changes based on performance

Report insights, wins, opportunities, and next actions directly to Taylor each week



Success Metrics

You will be measured on:

download growth, target 2x within 6 months

YouTube watch-time and audience retention

click-through rate on titles and thumbnails

subscriber growth month over month

guest share rate, target 80 percent or higher

improved discoverability through search and suggested traffic



Required Skills

Strong experience growing YouTube channels, podcast channels, or both

Strong understanding of YouTube SEO, keyword strategy, search intent, metadata, and discoverability

Ability to write high-converting, SEO-aware titles without sounding robotic or generic

Strong understanding of CTR, retention, watch-time, and how they work together

Able to analyse performance data and turn insights into action

Strong instincts for hooks, audience psychology, and episode packaging

Proactive, strategic, creative, and highly performance-driven

Excellent communication and able to work closely with a producer and content team



Bonus if

You have worked on a creator-led brand or podcast before

You have helped grow a channel through YouTube search and suggested traffic

You understand how to turn long-form episodes into a larger content growth system

You care about women in business, leadership, and wealth-building conversations



Compensation

$500 - $800 AUD per month depending on experience

performance-based bonuses for hitting growth milestones

long-term opportunity with room to grow into a leadership role



To Apply, please send:

1. your CV and portfolio

2. examples of channels, podcasts, or content brands you have helped grow



Why This Role Matters



This role is about more than uploading content.



You will help shape how this brand is found, watched, and remembered.



You will play a key role in helping more women discover the show, trust the brand, and build wealth through the ideas and conversations we share.



If you are strategic, SEO-savvy, obsessed with performance, and know how to grow content on YouTube, we want to hear from you.

title: Architectural CAD Drafter (Australian experience desired)
description:
Remote CAD Draftsperson (Kitchens, Joinery & Bathrooms)

We’re a premium Australian BPO seeking an experienced CAD Draftsperson for our client, an Australian design and construction company specialising in high-end kitchens and bathrooms and custom joinery. 



This full time role offers the flexibility of working from home, a market leading salary package + paid leave + bonuses and a supportive BPO environment. Work with a market-leading Australian architecture firm. Be part of a collaborative and quality focused team and gain valuable exposure to high-end residential projects. 



We’re looking for an experienced (5 years +) CAD Draftsperson with a strong background in Australian joinery/cabinetry drafting—not just general architectural drafting—who can confidently deliver accurate, build-ready drawings in a fast-paced environment.



The Role-

Key Responsibilities Include-

Prepare detailed CAD drawings for kitchens, joinery, and bathrooms

Identify and resolve potential issues early (dimensions, clearances, appliance integration)

Ensure all drawings meet design intent, build requirements, and company standards

Collaborate with designers and tea
mbers to resolve queries



Key Requirements Include-

Strong experience in Australian joinery/cabinetry drafting (essential)

Strong understanding of:

-Cabinet construction

-Appliance integration

-Clearances and spatial planning

-Ability to read and interpret plans/specifications with accuracy

-High attention to detail with a focus on first-time accuracy

-Confident communicator who asks questions early when needed

- Excellent communication skills in English both written and verbal 

-Ability to manage multiple projects and overlapping timelines and deadlines



Nice to Have (Not required)

Cost- Estimating experience

Experience with cabinet manufacturing or installation drawings



Technical Requirements (Essential)- 

To ensure optimal performance with SketchUp and Layout, candidates must have:



Device Requirements:

- Minimum 32GB RAM

- Intel i7 (or equivalent) CPU

- S- SD: 512GB – 1TB



Internet Requirements:

- Fast and stable internet connection (suitable for handling large files and cloud-based workflows). 



To Apply Please Include: 



- A brief overview of your experience specific to Australian clients. A brief overview of your experience with kitchens, bathrooms and custom joinery. 

- Your most updated CV. 

- Your Portfolio- with best examples of your work. 

- An overview of your WFH set up- including your Device Specifications and Internet Speed Test. 



We're looking forward to working with you! Thank you!

title: Amazon and eBay Virtual Assistant (Lego Specialist / Online Arbitrage)
description:
Looking for a talented VA with past experience in working with US based Amazon selling. We are seeking a long-term employee who is good at problem solving. 



This is a Part-Time "Trial to Growth" position that will eventually require full-time as the business grows

This is a hybrid role: 50% Product Sourcing (Finding the Gold) and 50?ministrative/Operations (Managing the Machine).

You must be available for 3–4 Zoom calls per week and respond to messages within a few hours during working hours.





Key Responsibilities:



Specialized Sourcing: Use Tactical Arbitrage and manual "Storefront Stalking" to find Lego leads with high ROI and low competition.



Lead Validation: Use Keepa and SellerAmp to analyze price stability and "End of Life" (EOL) potential.



Data Management: Record all leads in Google Sheets with accurate profit calculations (including prep center fees).



eBay Support: Draft listings, edit photos (background removal), and manage customer inquiries for our eBay storefront.



Administrative: Monitor Amazon Account Health daily and assist with shipment reconciliation between our Prep Center and FBA.

 

Look out for and familiarize yourself with market trends in lego





Requirements:

English Fluency: C1 or C2 level (Written and Verbal). You must be able to communicate clearly with Amazon Support and US-based retailers.



Keepa & Tactical Arbitrage (REQUIRED): You must be able to read a Keepa chart like a pro—identifying price tanking, IP complaint patterns, and seasonal spikes.



SellerAmp (Required): Expert at calculating net profit after all fees.



Excel and Google Sheets (Required): Must be familiar and able to use google sheets and excel 



Lego Knowledge (Preferred but not required): Familiarity with Lego themes (Star Wars, Technic, Icons) and the retirement cycle as well as an enjoyment for legos



Communication: Strong written English for handling customer service on eBay and Amazon.



Internet: A stable, high-speed connection is a must.



Mindset: Analytical, proactive, and detail-oriented.





Benefits:



Flexible Schedule: Work whenever you are most productive, provided deadlines are met.



Bi-weekly Payment: Reliable, on-time payments.



Performance Bonuses: We believe in rewarding VAs who find "Deep Buy" leads that result in high-volume profit.



Growth: As the business grows, your role and compensation will grow with it.





How to Apply:

We value attention to detail above all else. To demonstrate that you have read this entire listing and can follow instructions perfectly:



Subject Line: Your application must start with your favorite animal followed by your full name.



Introduction: Tell us about a difficult time in your role as an Amazon VA and how you overcame it.



A brief summary of your experience with Keepa and Tactical Arbitrage.



Have you ever sourced Legos or toys? What is your favorite Lego theme to source and why?



Are you familiar with cross-listing products from Amazon to eBay?



Analysis Test: Briefly explain why we avoid listings where Amazon is a constant seller, even if the ROI looks good. Are there any exceptions where you would still recommend the buy?



Proof: Attach or link your English proficiency results and provide a brief video introduction of yourself.



Applications that do not follow the previous instructions will be automatically disqualified.



We will provide a 30-minute sample sourcing project to qualified candidates. 



Performance-Based Scalability: We are a fast-growing company. As you hit your KPIs (Key Performance Indicators) and help the business scale, your compensation will be reviewed to reflect your impact.



Look forward to hearing from you and hope to work together soon.
