title: New Client Intake - Legal Services April 2026
description:
We are seeking a warm, engaging, empathetic and detail-oriented Remote Intake Specialist to serve as the first point of contact for prospective clients.



This is more than a call-handling role—you will be the voice of our firm, setting the tone for each client’s experience and helping individuals feel heard, understood, and confident in taking the next step.



What You’ll Do

• Serve as the first point of contact for prospective clients via phone and other communication channels  

• Engage callers in a professional, friendly, and conversational manner that reflects our firm’s values  

• Follow structured intake scripts to gather key information efficiently and accurately  

• Ask thoughtful follow-up questions to ensure a clear understanding of the caller’s needs  

• Enter and maintain detailed, accurate information in our CRM system  

• Schedule consultations and ensure a smooth handoff to our legal team  

• Provide a reassuring and positive experience for individuals who may be navigating sensitive situations  

 



This is not a gig opportunity - we are committed to long term success for both the firm and you.. 



A summary/outline of the position: 



• Maintain the ethical integrity of the firm at all time

• Determine the suitability of the firm for the potential client

• Determine the suitability of the potential client for the firm

• Identify the most desirable cases/matters for engagement

• Gather and preserve important information for potential conflict of interest analysis and case/matter assessment

• Complete an initial consultation and engage the potential client if appropriate

• Direct the potential client to the person at the firm with the ability to conduct an initial consultation and engage the potential client if appropriate

• Prior experience in a law firm intake role or professional call center environment (legal experience strongly preferred)  

• Exceptional and clear (USA) verbal and written English communication skills  

• A natural ability to build rapport—engaging, personable, and empathetic  

• Ability to balance being conversational while also adhering to scripts and processes  

• Strong attention to detail with a high level of accuracy in data entry  

• Comfortable using CRM systems and learning new technology platforms  

• Reliable, organized, and able to work independently in a remote setting  

• A professional demeanor and a genuine desire to help others  



Prefer candidates with paralegal background, or comfortable with basic legal terminology.



The firm will provide significant training and scripts to ensure you’re comfortable and skilled before taking a call. 



The calls will be originating from the USA.  These calls will be made over VOIP, therefore the candidate must have high speed internet access that allows for calls and use of a computer during the phone call.  Calls will be recorded.



Necessary Skills and Experience



• Attention to detail

• Interpersonal/communication skills

• Skilled at listening and following up with questions to better understand the callers  true desires

• Familiarity with various computer programs (Word/Excel/etc.)

• Experience with ActionStep and Lawmatics is a big plus

• 1-3 years of professional customer service experience is preferred  

• Empathy!



Please include a brief voice recording if applying to this position.  When replying by
 please include the the word VOICE in the subject line.



Hours will be 9-5:30 EST USA with 30 minute break.

title: AI Automation Engineer (n8n & Claude Expert)
description:
Job Title: AI Automation & Workflow Engineer (n8n Expert)

About the Role:

We are looking for a developer to build intelligent, multi-step automations that go beyond simple "if-this-then-that" flows. Our goal is to create sophisticated systems for automated reporting, custom internal chatbots, and data-driven workflows. You should be comfortable choosing the best AI model (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.) for the specific task at hand and integrating them seamlessly into n8n.



Responsibilities:

Workflow Architecture: Design and deploy complex, multi-branch workflows in n8n.



AI Implementation: Integrate various LLMs (Large Language Models) via API for text analysis, automated decision-making, and chatbot logic.



Automated Reporting: Build systems that pull data from various sources (CRMs, SQL, Sheets), process it through AI, and generate formatted reports.



Custom Chatbots: Develop and maintain custom AI agents/chatbots for internal or external use.



API Integration: Connect various tools (Slack,
, CRM, Databases) using Webhooks and HTTP Request nodes.



Custom Scripting: Write JavaScript within n8n to handle complex data transformations that standard nodes can’t manage.



Requirements:

Expert n8n Knowledge: Deep experience building and troubleshooting workflows on the n8n platform.

title: Part-Time Phone Assistant for US Painting Company (Clear English Required)
description:
About us:

We are Spruce Point Painting, a premium residential painting company in Vermont, USA. We work with high-end homeowners and our brand depends on professional, warm, confident phone communication.

The role:

You will be the first voice our potential clients hear when they call. Your job is to handle initial lead calls, ask the right questions, and book site visits for our team.

What you will do:



Answer inbound calls from homeowners during US Eastern Time business hours

Return missed calls and new leads quickly (target is within 15 minutes)

Follow our structured call script to qualify leads and understand their project

Book appointments directly into our calendar system

Enter clean, detailed notes into our CRM (Jobber, we will train you)

Send confirmation texts and follow-up messages

Flag complex or high-value leads to the owner



What we are looking for:



Excellent English, clear and neutral-sounding. Our clients are American homeowners and must feel comfortable on the phone with you.

3+ years of US-based phone experience (call center, customer service, appointment setting, ISA for real estate, or home services)

Confident, warm, and professional phone presence

Strong attention to detail when taking notes

Available Monday to Friday during US Eastern Time business hours (approximately 8am to 6pm ET, which is 9pm to 7am Philippine Time)

Reliable internet, quiet work environment, and a good quality headset

Experience with Jobber, ServiceTitan, Housecall Pro, or similar CRM is a plus



What we offer:



Ongoing long-term role, not a short project

Paid hourly with performance bonuses for confirmed estimates and closed jobs

Full training on our script, systems, and CRM

Clear expectations and direct communication

Room to grow into more hours as our business expands



How to apply:

Please send your application with the following:



A voice recording of 30 to 60 seconds introducing yourself. Say: "Hi, this is [your name] with Spruce Point Painting, how can I help you today?" Then briefly share your phone experience. Upload to Google Drive or Vocaroo and share the link.

A homeowner calls and says: "I just want a ballpark. How much does it cost to paint a 2,000 square foot house?" How would you respond? (Write your response in your application.)

List your US phone experience. Include company names, your role, how long, and any CRMs you used.

Your time zone and confirm you can work US Eastern Time business hours.



Applications without the voice recording will not be reviewed.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Levi

Spruce Point Painting

title: Civil Engineer
description:
Job Title: Civil Engineer (Remote) – Construction Drawings, Estimating Support & Project Documentation

Job Type: Full-time / Part-time (open to both)

Salary Range: Negotiable based on experience

Hours: Flexible, with overlap during US Eastern Time business hours preferred



About Us

We are a US-based construction and contracting group operating across multiple trades — commercial roofing, flooring, solar, and home improvement. We are looking for a skilled, detail-oriented Civil Engineer to join our remote team and support our estimating, drafting, and project documentation workflows.



What You'll Do

You will work directly with our project managers and estimators to produce the technical deliverables that keep our jobs moving. Day-to-day work includes preparing and reviewing construction drawings in AutoCAD and Revit, performing quantity takeoffs from architectural and structural plans, drafting site plans and detail sheets, reviewing specifications to flag scope gaps, supporting bid preparation with engineering calculations, and helping organize submittals, RFIs, and shop drawings. You will also assist with as-built documentation and produce clean, professional markups for owner and GC submissions.



Required Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering or a closely related field. At least three years of professional experience in civil, structural, or construction engineering. Strong proficiency in AutoCAD; Revit and Bluebeam Revu experience strongly preferred. Comfortable reading commercial construction drawings and specifications across architectural, structural, and MEP disciplines. Solid understanding of takeoff methods and construction means and methods. Excellent written and spoken English — you will be communicating directly with US-based staff and occasionally with clients. Reliable high-speed internet, a quiet work environment, and a computer capable of running CAD software smoothly.



Nice to Have

Experience with US building codes (IBC, IRC) and ASCE 7. Familiarity with roofing systems (TPO, EPDM, modified bitumen), flooring assemblies, or solar PV layouts. Experience with PlanSwift, RoofSnap, or similar takeoff tools. Prior experience working with American contractors or design-build firms.



What We Offer

Competitive pay benchmarked to your skill level and experience, with raises tied to performance. Long-term, stable work — we are looking to build a relationship, not fill a one-off project. Paid time off after probation. Christmas bonus (13th month equivalent). Direct mentorship from experienced US-based PMs and estimators. Flexible schedule once you're up to speed.



How to Apply

Please send (1) your updated CV, (2) a portfolio or 2–3 sample drawings you have personally produced (PDF preferred), (3) a brief paragraph describing your most challenging project and your specific role on it, and (4) your expected monthly salary in USD.



In the subject line of your application, please write "Civil Engineer – [Your Name]" so we know you read the full posting. Applications without a portfolio sample will not be reviewed.



We look forward to meeting you.

title: Media Buyer - VA
description:
Joburn Pte. Ltd.



We're an AI-powered growth agency. We've driven over $5M in client revenue in two years — our flagship client went from $15K/month to over $1M ARR under our system.



We don't do "run some ads and see what happens." We build compounding growth machines: diagnostic audits, analytics pipelines, ad creative engines, CRM automation, and conversion tracking — all wired together so every dollar spent teaches us something.



The agency is scaling from a handful of high-touch clients to 50+ Growth Partner accounts. That's where you come in.



What you're actually doing



You're the person who makes sure campaigns are built right, running clean, and improving every week.



Here's what a typical day looks like:



Morning: Check in via Slack standup. Review yesterday's ad performance across client accounts in Meta Ads Manager. Flag anything bleeding money.

Mid-day: Launch new ad sets, swap out fatigued creatives, adjust budgets based on CPA and ROAS trends. Most of this takes 30–60 minutes per client — not days.

Afternoon: Pull performance data, build client reports that actually say something useful (not just screenshots of dashboards), and feed winning patterns back into our system so the next round of creative is sharper than the last.

You'll work primarily inside Meta Ads Manager 
 + Instagram), with more platforms coming as we scale. You'll also touch GoHighLevel (our CRM — tracking leads from ad click to closed deal), 
 (automation that routes creatives, pulls data, and syncs everything), and Supabase (where all the performance data lives).



You don't need to be an expert in all of those on day one. But you need to be fluent in Ads Manager. That's non-negotiable.



The AI part — read this carefully



Our system uses AI for roughly 90–95% of the operational work. Claude writes first-draft ad copy. 
 routes it through approval flows. HeyGen and ElevenLabs produce video creative. Supabase stores and surfaces the analytics.



Your job is the final 5–10%. The part that actually determines whether the money was well spent. You're checking that campaign structures make sense, audiences are right, budgets aren't misconfigured, and nothing's quietly wasting spend at 2am.



That 5–10% is where the skill lives. AI can generate. You d
 what ships.



And here's the part most job posts won't say: at some point, AI will handle media buying end-to-end. The people who thrive here are the ones who treat AI as a tool that makes them faster — not a threat they're competing against. If you understand that and want to be on the right side of it, we want to talk.



What we need from you



Must-haves:



Hands-on experience in
 Ads Manager. You've spent real budgets, managed real campaigns, and made real optimization decisions. Not "I completed a course." You should be able to open an unfamiliar ad account, audit what's running, and tell us what's broken within 30 minutes.

You think in hours, not days. When something needs doing, you do it now. Most tasks here are 30–60 minutes, maybe two hours. "I'll get to it by end of week" doesn't work here.

Analytical instinct. You see a CPL spike and you already have three hypotheses before anyone asks.

Detail obsession. Wrong UTM parameters, mismatched audiences, typos in ad copy — that stuff should physically bother you.

Rock-solid internet. Not "usually fine." You're managing live ad spend. A dropped connection at the wrong time costs real money.

Good to have:



Experience with GoHighLevel, 
, or any CRM/automation platform

Comfort working alongside AI tools (if you already use ChatGPT or Claude for work, say so)

Experience building client-facing performance reports — not just pulling numbers, but explaining what they mean and what to do next

What you get



Hourly role. You start at a rate that reflects where you are right now. Prove you can execute, and the rate moves up. We don't cap people who deliver results.

Performance incentives tied to the outcomes you drive. We reward people who make our clients money.

Training on our systems. You'll learn our AI stack, our creative frameworks, our reporting standards. We invest in people who are in it for real — but we can't teach you how to think. The foundations need to already be there.

A seat at a small, fast team. This isn't a 200-person agency where you're a cog. You'll work directly with the people building the system. Your input shapes how we operate.

100% remote. Work from wherever. Just be reachable, be fast, and deliver.

To apply



Reply with the subject line: "The capital of Japan is [your answer]"



If you can't follow that one instruction, we already have our answer.

title: Senior Accountant / Management Accountant
description:
Senior Accountant (AU Client) – Xero Certified



Reports to: Managing Director

Location: Remote (Work From Home)

Employment Type: Full Time

Work Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Manila Time



About the Role



Staff Connect Australia is recruiting on behalf of an established Australian business operating across multiple service divisions.



We are seeking a high-level, Xero-accredited Senior Accountant to take full ownership of the company’s financial systems, reporting, and compliance. This long-term role reports directly to the Managing Director and requires a detail-driven professional who can independently manage accounting operations while delivering accurate reporting and actionable financial insights to support business decisions.



This role is ideal for someone experienced in Australian accounting standards, multi-entity structures, and operational financial reporting.



Systems & Tools Environment

Xero

GeoOp

Live Payments Portal

Airtable

Slack



Certifications Required

- Xero Advisor Certified

- Xero Payroll Certified



Required Experience

- Australian BAS and IAS preparation

- Company tax return support (liaising with external accountants as needed)

- Experience working with Australian clients or accounting firms



Key Responsibilities

Bookkeeping & Reconciliations

-Maintain accurate financial records in Xero for all entities

- Perform bank, credit card, and loan reconciliations

- Allocate GST codes and track job-related costs

- Review and code expense entries with proper documentation

- Reconcile inter-entity transactions and maintain a clean general ledger

-

Accounts Payable (Suppliers & Contractors)

- Process and schedule invoices for payment

- Verify invoice accuracy against purchase orders or job references

- Reconcile supplier statements and maintain positive relationships

- Process weekly contractor payments and maintain payout registers

-

Accounts Receivable (Customer Billing & Collections)

- Review job logs from GeoOp and ensure accurate invoicing

- Identify and correct invoicing/data-entry errors

- Manage debtor follow-ups and resolve invoice disputes

- Maintain an accurate aged receivables ledger and report trends



Payroll & Contractor Management

- Process fortnightly payroll in compliance with Australian award rules

- Audit ove
 claims for accuracy and fairness

- Reconcile PAYG, superannuation, and leave balances

- Maintain employee and contractor payment records

- Post and reconcile all payroll journals



Balance Sheet, Assets & Financial Control

- Maintain reconciled balance sheets each month

- Manage the fixed asset register and depreciation schedules

- Record and monitor capital purchases (vehicles, IT, plant, and equipment)

- Administer dividend payments, director loans, and shareholder distributions

- Track intercompany transactions, retained earnings, and equity movements



BAS / IAS Preparation & Compliance

- Prepare monthly IAS and quarterly BAS for review

- Ensure GST and PAYG data is accurate

- Maintain full working papers and supporting documentation

- Monitor ATO correspondence and ensure timely compliance



Financial & Operational Reporting

- Produce weekly cashflow forecasts and monthly management reports

- Conduct variance analysis and identify cost-saving opportunities

- Track workforce utilization, revenue per labour hour, and service profitability

- Provide actionable insights for management, including pricing and discount analysis



Audit & Year-End Support

- Prepare reconciliations and schedules for audits and EOFY processes

- Liaise with external accountants and auditors

- Assist with year-end adjustments, including depreciation, accruals, and provisions



Key Skills & Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or equivalent

- Minimum 3+ years’ experience with Australian clients or accounting firms

- Advanced Xero proficiency, including payroll, fixed assets, and reporting

- Strong knowledge of Australian BAS, GST, PAYG, and Superannuation compliance

- Experience managing balance sheets, dividends, and inter-entity accounts

- Excellent accounts payable, receivable, and reconciliation skills

- Strong analytical and financial reporting capability

- High attention to detail and accuracy

- Able to work independently and proactively identify risks or opportunities



Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- Balance sheets reconciled monthly with full supporting schedules

- Zero unexplained variances in payroll, assets, or BAS accounts

- Timely issuance of invoices and active debtor management

- Accurate and punctual supplier and contractor payments

- Management reports delivered with insightful commentary on trends and efficiencies

- Workforce utilization, cancellations, and discount impacts reported monthly

- BAS/IAS submissions prepared ahead of deadlines

- EOFY and audit documentation complete and delivered on time

title: FULL STACK DEVELOPER  P22,400/week | Weekly Pay | 13th month
description:
FULL STACK DEVELOPER 



Full-Time | 40 hours/week | Remote (Philippines)

Rate: P22,400/week

Weekly pay via Wise | 13th Month Pay | Paid Training | Long-Term Career

8:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST, Monday - Friday (8-hour workday with 1-hour lunch)



ABOUT THE OPPORTUNITY

Atlanta Lactation is a high-volume U.S. medical practice -- 17 clinicians, 12+ locations, hundreds of patients and DME shipments per month -- and we are building our own technology from the inside out. That includes a custom EMR (Electronic Medical Records) platform being built from the ground up, plus a deep backlog of automations, integrations, and internal tools that keep our clinical operations running.



We are not a marketing agency. We are not an e-commerce shop. We are not looking for someone to maintain a WordPress site.



This is product work. Your code will be in production, used by real clinicians and real patients, every day. The work is not going to run out. We have months of builds ahead of us and a pipeline of projects that keeps growing.

You will work directly with the practice owner and our lead developer. No project managers. No layers. No tickets that disappear into a queue. You will talk to the people who make decisions and ship code that solves real problems the same week.



ABOUT US

Atlanta Lactation is a patient-centered, insurance-supported lactation practice serving families across metro Atlanta through home visits, office visits, and telehealth. We also operate a growing DME fulfillment operation -- breast pumps and breastfeeding supplies shipped directly to patients.



We are a fully remote, all-female U.S. healthcare team with 9 Filipino tea
mbers, some approaching 6 years with us. We don't cycle through contractors. We hire people we want to keep, train them well, and build long careers together.

Female candidates preferred. This role is backend and not patient-facing, but our team is all-female and we prioritize maintaining that environment.



HOW TO APPLY

Please apply by messaging us through OnlineJobs.ph and include:

 - Subject line must read: FULL STACK - [Your Name]

 - Your updated resume.

 - A link to your GitHub (or equivalent) with at least one project we can review.

 - A 1-2 minute voice or video introduction telling us about your technical background and why this role interests you.

 - Please do not
 or text the practice directly. Only applications through OJP will be considered.



Applications that do not include all three items will not be considered.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Own automations and integrations. Our operational stack includes IntakeQ (our current EMR), Spruce (patient messaging), custom Vercel dashboards, clearinghouse integrations, and DME fulfillment systems. There is a deep, growing backlog of API integrations, webhooks, form automations, and internal tools that need to be built and maintained. You will take ownership of this work.

 - Become our IntakeQ expert. Every endpoint, every webhook, every form automation capability. IntakeQ is our current EMR and will remain in active use while we build our new platform. We need someone who is willing to learn it inside and out -- not just how to use it, but how to build on top of it.

 - Contribute to our custom EMR build. Our lead developer is building a new EMR platform purpose-built for our practice (Next.js, Vercel, Neon, modern JS/TS). You will support this build as needed -- contributing to backend, frontend, and integrations as the project evolves.

 - Ship with AI tools. We build with Claude Code. This is not optional. If you have not used Claude Code specifically, that is fine -- but you must be actively building with AI-assisted coding tools (Cursor, Copilot, or similar) in your real workflow today, and be ready to work in Claude Code from day one.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - We care more about how you think and how fast you learn than how many years you have on a resume.

 - Full stack development experience with modern JavaScript/TypeScript. Next.js and Vercel experience preferred.

 - Comfortable reading API documentation and building integrations end-to-end -- REST APIs, webhooks, authentication.

 - Currently using AI-assisted coding tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot) in your actual daily work. Be ready to talk about this specifically.

 - Database experience (Postgres, Neon, or similar).

 - Strong written and spoken English. You need to communicate clearly about what you are building, what is blocked, and what you need.

 - Self-directed. You can take a problem, figure out the approach, and ship it. You also know when to ask instead of guessing.

 - Fast learner. You will need to pick up systems you have never touched before -- IntakeQ, Spruce, clearinghouse APIs, healthcare billing workflows. We will train you on the domain. You need to be someone who gets up to speed quickly.

 -Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace.

 - This is a dedicated, full-time role with no room for other projects or other clients during scheduled hours.  



PREFERRED 

 - Experience with U.S. healthcare systems, HIPAA, or medical software.

 - Experience building EMRs, practice management software, or clinical tools.

 - Experience with IntakeQ, Spruce, or healthcare APIs.

 - Experience with shipping/logistics APIs or e-commerce backends.

 - DevOps experience (Vercel deployments, environment management, monitoring).



COMPENSATION

Rate: P22,400/week (~$400 USD/week)

Weekly pay via Wise

13th Month Pay: Provided (pro-rated during the first year)

All Philippine regular holidays are observed and paid for this role.

Schedule: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST, Monday - Friday (8-hour workday with 1-hour lunch)

This is a dedicated, full-time role. You may not work on other projects or clients during your scheduled hours. We use time-tracking software to monitor work sessions.



HIRING PROCESS

 - We might run a paid trial period before extending a permanent offer. Trial structure will be discussed with shortlisted candidates. 



HOW TO APPLY

Please apply by messaging us through OnlineJobs.ph and include:

 - Subject line must read: FULL STACK - [Your Name]

 - Your updated resume.

 - A link to your GitHub (or equivalent) with at least one project we can review.

 - A 1-2 minute voice or video introduction telling us about your technical background and why this role interests you.

 - Please do not
 or text the practice directly. Only applications through OJP will be considered.



Applications that do not include all three items will not be considered.

title: Full-Time Growth & SEO Specialist — Personal Brand + Trading Education Business
description:
Full-Time Growth & SEO Specialist — Personal Brand + Trading Education Business



Salary: $600/month

Hours: Full-time, 40 hours/week

Schedule: Work whatever hours you want — I only care about KPIs and growth

Start Date: ASAP



---



ABOUT THE ROLE



I'm hiring one full-time Growth Specialist to own two tracks simultaneously:



1. Personal Brand Growth — rank my name on Google, book me on podcasts, get me published in online articles

2. Business SEO — full on-page, off-page, and technical SEO for a trading education company website, plus ongoing audits and backlink building



This is not a multi-task VA role. This is a high-output growth role with daily, weekly, and monthly targets. If you consistently miss them, we part ways. If you consistently hit them, this becomes a long-term growing position with heavy upside.



---



WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Personal Brand (50% of time):

- Research and pitch 125+ podcasts per week for guest appearances

- Write and pitch guest articles to niche blogs and mid-tier publications

- Track and improve my name's ranking on Google (page 1 domination)

- Build and manage a media kit, pitch templates, and outreach CRM

- Coordinate with any external PR specialists I bring in



Business SEO (50% of time):

- Full on-page SEO audits and implementation (titles, meta, schema, internal linking)

- Technical SEO monitoring (Google Search Console, Core Web Vitals, crawl errors)

- Off-page SEO — build high-quality backlinks through outreach, guest posting, directories

- Keyword research and content briefs for any writers

- Weekly competitor SERP analysis

- Monthly full-site SEO audit with action plan



Reporting (always):

- Daily EOD report (short, bullet format)

- Weekly audit report every Friday

- Monthly performance overview with rankings, backlinks, placements, bookings



---



KPIs — THIS IS WHAT YOU'LL BE MEASURED ON



Daily:

- 25+ cold outreach pitches sent (podcasts + articles combined)

- 8+ on-page or off-page SEO tasks completed on the company website

- EOD report submitted before end of your workday

- Pipeline CRM updated with every response, follow-up, and status change



Weekly:

- 125+ podcast pitches sent

- 50+ article pitches sent

- 25+ new quality backlinks built or earned

- Full SEO progress report delivered every Friday

- Keyword ranking tracker updated for all target keywords



Monthly:

- 15+ confirmed podcast bookings

- 10+ article placements live and indexed

- 80+ quality backlinks built to company site

- Measurable SERP movement on target keywords (tracked and reported)

- Full monthly audit with wins, misses, and next-month action plan



Month 1 (ramp-up):

- Complete full SEO audit on main company website

- Build podcast outreach pipeline of 500+ targeted shows

- Send 400+ podcast pitches

- Land first 5 podcast bookings

- Identify and pitch 80+ article opportunities

- Land first 5 article placements

- 40+ backlinks built to company site



---



REQUIREMENTS



Must-have:

- 3+ years experience in SEO and/or PR outreach

- Excellent written English — native-level, no exceptions

- Proven track record of placing guest articles or booking podcasts (portfolio required)

- Hands-on experience with Ahrefs OR Semrush, Google Search Console, GA4

- Strong research skills — you can find any podcast host's
, any journalist's contact

- Clear, direct communication — you say what you mean and deliver what you commit to

- Leadership mindset — you understand that success takes ownership, accountability, and follow-through. You don't wait to be told what to do



Nice-to-have:

- Experience with trading, finance, real estate, or entrepreneurship niches

- Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL)

- Content writing skills (to support pitch drafting)

- Technical SEO experience (schema, site speed, JS rendering)



Deal-breakers:

- "SEO generalists" with no specific pitch/outreach experience

- Anyone using generic automated outreach templates as their main workflow

- Freelancers who want to juggle 3 other clients (this is a full-time role)

- Anyone whose portfolio is mostly PBNs, press release farms, or low-DA link farms



---



HOW TO APPLY



This application requires real work upfront. If you're not willing to put in effort before you're hired, you're not the person for this role.



Send me a single message with:



1. Subject line: "Growth Specialist — [Your Name]"



2. Your portfolio — at least 3 live links to podcasts you've booked or articles you've placed for past clients. I will verify.



3. Google search audit — Search "Sai Donti" on Google. Screenshot page 1 of the results. In a short paragraph, tell me:

   - What's currently ranking

   - What's missing or weak

   - What your first 3 moves would be to dominate page 1 for this name



4. Company website SEO audit — Search "AllWin Academy" and find the company website. Run it through whatever SEO tools you use (Ahrefs, Semrush, PageSpeed Insights, etc.) and share a short audit covering:

   - On-page SEO issues you spotted

   - Technical SEO problems

   - Backlink profile observations

   - Your top 5 priority fixes in the first 30 days



5. Book positioning audit — Search "Currency of Mindset Sai Donti" on Google and Amazon. Tell me how the book is currently positioned, what's hurting its visibility, and 2 concrete ways you would leverage it as a ranking asset for my personal brand.



6. One podcast pitch sample — write me a 100-word cold pitch to a business podcast pitching me as a guest. Show me you can write.



7. Your availability — hours per day, any other commitments.



8. Why this role — 3 sentences on why you want this specifically, not why you want "any VA role."



Do not send generic cover letters, "I am hardworking and dedicated" paragraphs, or templates I can tell you've copy-pasted. I will ignore them. If you skip any of the audits above, I will ignore your application.



---



WHAT YOU GET



- Clear SOP from day one, no guessing

- Direct access to me — you report to the business owner, not a middle manager

- Heavy long-term upside and bonus pay opportunities once you prove your spot

- A real role with real stakes, not a glorified task rabbit



If you're a high-performer looking for a serious long-term role where your work actually moves the needle, this is it. If you're looking for easy $600/month to coast on, this isn't for you.



Apply seriously or don't apply.

title: Content Creator & Video Editor
description:
Beauty · Fashion · Women's Products · eCommerce



About the Role



We are looking for a creative, trend-savvy Content Creator & Editor to join our growing team. In this role, you will be responsible for conceptualising, filming, editing, and publishing short-form video content across "UnderWunder's" Instagram and TikTok, as well as supporting our online eCommerce business with compelling visual assets. This is a fantastic opportunity for someone who lives and breathes social media, has a genuine passion for beauty and fashion, and knows exactly what it takes to stop the scroll.

Key Responsibilities

Create high-quality short-form video content for Instagram Reels and TikTok, tailored to each platform's audience and format

Ideate and produce content that aligns with current trends, viral formats, and trending audio

Self-direct video shoots — including filming, lighting setup, and on-camera presence where required

Edit videos to a professional standard, incorporating graphics, text overlays, captions, and effects

Develop and manage content for our eCommerce brand, including product showcases, unboxings, and lifestyle content

Stay ahead of trending sounds, challenges, and cultural 
nts relevant to beauty, fashion, and women's lifestyle

Design supporting graphics and visual assets using Canva and other editing tools

Take initiative in pitching and executing content ideas — we want someone who brings ideas to the table, not just executes briefs

Collaborate with the team to align content with brand campaigns and product launches

Timecode and edit large video files from content shoots, ensuring footage is organised, trimmed, and prepared for final production

Review and audit the existing content library, restructuring it into a formal, organised system that is easy to navigate and maintain

Establish and implement clear file naming conventions across all content assets to ensure consistency, searchability, and efficient team workflows

Monitor content performance and provide insights to inform future strategy



What We're Looking For

Proven track record of creating viral or high-performing video content on TikTok and/or Instagram

Experience in the beauty, fashion, or women's lifestyle industry — either professionally or through personal content creation

Strong instinct for trending sounds and music — you know the right audio before it peaks

Confident self-director: able to plan, shoot, and produce content independently without heavy oversight

Proficiency in Canva and/or other graphics editing tools (Adobe Express, CapCut, etc.)

Excellent video editing skills with an eye for pacing, aesthetics, and storytelling

A proactive, solutions-focused attitude — we love people who take initiative and run with ideas

Strong understanding of eCommerce content strategy and how to drive engagement that converts

Highly organised with the ability to manage a content calendar and meet deadlines

Excellent communication skills and a collaborative approach



Desirable (But Not Essential)

Experience working with eCommerce brands or product-based businesses

Familiarity with Instagram and TikTok analytics and scheduling tools

Experience with UGC (User Generated Content) creation

An existing personal following or portfolio of viral content



The Details

Pay:  Competitive — commensurate with experience and demonstrated results

Location:  Remote / Flexible

Start Date:  ASAP





How to Apply

Your CV and link to google drive of your recent work showcasing you fit the criteria above

Links to your TikTok and/or Instagram profiles or a portfolio of recent content

title: Creatives Marketing VA
description:
About Us

The Collaborative Co is an Australian Virtual Assistant agency that supports business owners with strong systems and dependable talent. We help clients stay organised and run their businesses with confidence.

Job Overview



The client is a money-energetic coach and looking for a wing woman. You will provide social media, marketing, and operations support to help us run our client’s coaching business efficiently and consistently. You will take ownership of content scheduling, offer page management,
 automations, and backend systems - allowing our client to focus on creating, coaching, and growing.



This role suits someone who is organised, proactive, detail-oriented, and confident working independently. A calm, focused personality with a pinch of humour will fit right in.



Key Responsibilities

Content & Social Media

•       Prepare, format, and schedule Instagram posts (3-5 per week) from the client’s ideas and drafts

•       Post Instagram stories daily when content is provided

•       Repurpose content across platforms (e.g. Threads)

•       Upload captions, check links, and maintain visual consistency

•       Maintain and update the content calendar in Asana



Offers & Pages

•       Create and update offer pages in Showit and Kajabi

•       Build micro-offer PDF downloads and associated opt-in pages (approx. one per fortnight)

•       Implement edits, fix broken links, align visuals and page structure

•       Ensure all active offers are current, polished, and ready to sell



 & Automations

•       Set up and manage
 sequences in Kajabi (1-2 per week)

•       Format and upload
 content; test delivery flows

•       Maintain and monitor automations - opt-ins, sales flows, and follow-up sequences

•       Flag broken or underperforming flows proactively



Project & Task Management

•       Track and manage all open tasks and projects in Asana daily

•       Follow up on incomplete items and ensure projects are brought to completion

•       Proactively remind client of open loops, decisions needed, and priorities

•       Keep Asana boards clean, organised, and up to date



Backend & Operations

•       Organise and maintain Google Drive folder structure and asset library

•       Keep client journey assets (links, templates, documents) structured and labelled

•       Support campaign and launch preparation — uploading, formatting, and asset readiness

•       Provide light research, basic admin, and ad hoc operational support as needed



Qualifications and Skills

•       Minimum 3-5 years of experience in a Virtual Assistant, marketing operations, or social media coordinator role

•       Strong proficiency with Canva for formatting graphics and visual assets

•       Experience with Kajabi or a similar course/email platform 
 sequences, automations, offer pages)

•       Familiarity with Showit or similar website/page builders

•       Confident using Asana or a comparable project management tool

•       Excellent written English — Level 5 (exceptional, professional, error-free, able to draft client-facing materials)

•       Clear and professional spoken English — comfortable in Zoom conversations

•       Strong organisational skills and ability to manage multiple workstreams independently

•       Proactive communicator who raises issues without waiting to be asked

•       Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely

•       Availability to align with the client's Dubai (GMT +2) working schedule



Hours

•       Part-time engagement, 20 hours per week for a 3-month engagement with a view to grow dependent on how it goes.

•       Time-blocking schedule to be discussed and confirmed at onboarding

•       Must be available and responsive during agreed working windows aligned to GMT+2



Application Process

Apply here: 

Shortlisted candidates will be required to complete a skills test tailored to this client's business needs, including relevant tools and tasks. 

Skills test results will form a key part of the selection process.

title: Travel Assistant (Insurance Support) | Full-Time | Training Provided
description:
Travel Insurance Assistant / Specialist



(Full-Time, Remote, EST)



PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING



$7/Hour Starting Rate | 40 Hours | Full-Time



Opportunity for increases based on performance

Strong performers in this role have earned consistent pay increases.

We review every application manually, so thoughtful, tailored applications are prioritized.



Full-time remote role focused on:



Travel insurance coordination and related tasks: drafting travel insurance for review, calling Viking/speaking directly with guests, and maintaining HubSpot CRM and trackers.



DO NOT APPLY if:



-You do not have clear, confident spoken English that can be easily understood by senior clients.



-You do not have experience in the travel industry or working with detailed, client-facing processes.



-You submit template applications or generic resumes. Please keep your introduction natural and personal so we can understand you.



-You're seeking part-time, short-term, or freelance work.



-You cannot commit to U.S. Eastern Time business hours (9am–5pm EST, night shift PHP)



-You do not carefully follow application instructions. Applications missing steps may not be reviewed.



DO APPLY if:



-You have worked in the travel industry OR have strong experience handling detailed client support, bookings, or coordination tasks.



-You have experience explaining policies, handling client questions, or working with structured documentation (insurance experience is a strong advantage, but not required).



-You can send a short video introduction.



-You are looking for a long-term, full-time remote role with a stable team that invests in your growth.



-You are professional, detail-oriented, and take pride in doing things correctly.



-You can work independently, follow documented processes, and ask questions when something is unclear.



-If you have handled complex client situations, briefly mention one example in your application.



-If you have worked with senior or high-touch clients before, please highlight this.



About Us



We are a boutique travel agency based in Atlanta, GA (EST). We specialize in luxury river cruises with Viking and provide high-touch support for our clients.



We're warm, organized, and focused on delivering excellent service. Our team is small, collaborative, and values doing things right.



We have clear processes (SOPs) for most tasks. You will be trained and supported.



We're looking for someone who wants to grow into this role long-term.



Who We're Looking For



Must-Have:



Prior experience as a virtual assistant or in a similar remote support role



Excellent written English with a professional and friendly tone



Proven ability to work independently and manage detailed tasks



High attention to detail, follow-through, and accountability



Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace



Bonus Points:



Experience with TripMate, Allianz, or Travel Insured



Any experience with Viking Cruises or river cruising



HubSpot CRM experience (or experience with similar CRMs)



Familiarity with booking systems, invoices, or client records



Experience reviewing, explaining, or processing insurance (any industry)



Your Role



As our Virtual Assistant, you'll be responsible for:



Drafting client
s



Updating HubSpot CRM and internal trackers



Calling Viking Cruises and partners to verify information or resolve questions



Supporting the insurance department with administrative tasks



Accuracy matters. Small mistakes in names, dates, or policies can impact the client experience.



You will be trained and supported as you learn our systems.



So expectations are clear:



You'll work directly with our team as internal support



Guest/client
s are drafts for review



You'll have autonomy for routine tasks, with guidance on when to escalate



You'll be supported by an experienced team invested in your success



Schedule



Target hours: 9:00am to 5:00pm EST (evening/night shift in the Philippines — please confirm this works for you)



Hours may vary slightly based on business needs



Saturday coverage may be introduced later via rotation



How to Apply



Applications that don't follow these instructions may not be reviewed. This helps us identify candidates with strong attention to detail.



Candidates who clearly follow all steps are prioritized.



Step 1:



Send your application with the subject line or first sentence including: "Meghan's #1"



Step 2:



Include a short video introduction that:



Explains your relevant experience (insurance experience is a bonus, not required)



Shares why you're interested in this role



Describes what excites you about working with a team like ours



Keep it natural and concise. We are looking for clarity, not perfection.



Step 3:



Attach your CV or resume (if using Google Drive, ensure access is granted)



We're excited to meet someone who cares about doing great work and wants to grow with a strong team.



If that sounds like you — we encourage you to apply today.

mbers, clients, and vendors

title: Cold Call Specialist (Remote – Philippines)
description:
**About LeadKeep**



LeadKeep provides AI-powered phone receptionist solutions for small businesses across the United States — salons, spas, clinics, and more. Our AI answers calls 24/7, books appointments, handles FAQs, and sends call summaries so business owners never miss a customer.



We're growing fast and hiring a Cold Call Specialist to help us reach U.S. small business owners and book discovery calls with our sales team.





#LET'S TALK ABOUT THE MONEY FIRST



We believe in rewarding results. Here's what your earnings actually look like:



• Base pay: $4 USD/hour × 4 hours/day × 20 working days = $320/month guaranteed

• Performance bonus: +$10 USD for every discovery call that the prospect actually attends

• Realistic target: Our leads are pre-qualified small business owners who genuinely need this service. We expect a good caller to book 1–2 attended discovery calls per day — that's an extra $10–$20/day in bonuses

• Monthly bonus potential: 20–40 attended calls × $10 = $200–$400/month



Your expected total: $520–$720/month for a 4-hour/day part-time role.



Your entire daytime is free. This is a side income that pays like a full-time job.



Low End: Base $320 + Bonus $200 = $520/month

High End: Base $320 + Bonus $400 = $720/month



Payment is via PayPal, weekly (base hours + bonuses included each week).





SCHEDULE: 4 HOURS/DAY, MONDAY–FRIDAY



9:00 PM – 1:00 AM Philippine Time (= 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time)



This is the prime calling window — American business owners just arrived at work, they're handling admin, and they're most likely to answer the phone. That's exactly why this shift exists: you're calling when they're picking up.





#WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



Cold Calling (Primary Focus)

• Call U.S. small business owners using the lead lists we provide

• Introduce LeadKeep's AI receptionist service in a natural, friendly, and professional way

• Your goal: get the owner interested and book a discovery call with our Sales Rep

• Handle objections with confidence — "not interested" is just the start of the conversation

• Follow the call script we provide, but adapt naturally based on the flow



CRM Updates (During & After Calls)

• Update contact status in GoHighLevel (GHL) in real time

• Add tags, write call notes, and move contacts through the pipeline

• Keep records clean so the entire team knows what happened on every call





#WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Must-Have:

• Excellent spoken English with a clear, neutral accent — this is our #1 requirement. You'll be calling U.S. business owners directly, so you must sound natural, professional, and trustworthy

• Proven cold calling experience — you've done this before and you're comfortable talking to strangers

• Confident and resilient — rejection motivates you, not discourages you

• Currently residing in the Philippines

• Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet calling environment

• Available for the schedule: 9 PM – 1 AM PHT, Mon–Fri



Nice-to-Have:

• B2B telemarketing or outbound sales experience

• Experience calling U.S.-based clients

• Experience with GoHighLevel or similar CRM





#WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



• Business owners actually want to hear what you have to say

• You consistently book discovery calls that prospects show up to

• Your CRM records are always clean and up to date

• Over time, you help us refine our messaging and improve together





#HOW TO APPLY



Step 1: Submit your application on OnlineJobs.ph



Step 2: Include an audio recording (upload to Google Drive and share the link). Answer these 3 questions — speak naturally, as if you're on a real call:



1. "Pretend you're calling a hair salon owner who has never heard of LeadKeep. You only have 15 seconds before they hang up. Go."

2. "The owner says: 'I'm really busy right now, I'm not interested.' What do you say next?"

3. "What's one thing that makes you good at cold calling?"



Important:

• Applications without an audio recording will not be reviewed

• Do not send a generic self-introduction — answer the 3 questions above

• Total recording should be under 2 minutes



Step 3: If your recording is a good fit, we'll reach out to you directly.



Questions? Contact us through the OnlineJobs.ph messaging system.



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Senior Video Editor [ US-Based Brand ]
description:
Application Requirements:

1. Use at least 10AP for your application.

2. Include "Senior Video Editor Pro" in your subject line.



Note: Applications missing either requirement will not be considered.

_________________________________________________________

About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

- all feedback is applied

- no new issues are introduced

- output meets brand and quality standards

- Maintain consistently high production quality across all deliverables.



Note:

title: REMOTE OPERATIONS DIRECTOR  (GoHighLevel + Cleaning/Janitorial / Facility Operations Background Required)
description:
REMOTE OPERATIONS DIRECTOR



(Executive-Level | GoHighLevel + Automation Systems + Commercial Cleaning / Facility Operations Required)



Schedule: Monday–Thursday | 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM EST

Type: Full-Time | Long-Term

Tracking: TimeProof required during all working hours





ROLE OVERVIEW



We are hiring a Remote Operations Director to take full ownership of execution, systems, team performance, and profitability across Sales Support, Marketing Systems, and Operations.



This is an executive operations role—not a task-based VA position.



You will be responsible for:

	•	Building and enforcing structure

	•	Managing people and performance

	•	Designing and maintaining automation systems

	•	Ensuring the company operates efficiently, predictably, and profitably



You will serve as the operational bridge between:

	•	Cold Callers / SDRs

	•	Marketing

	•	Estimating

	•	Field Operations



You own outcomes, not activity.





CRITICAL REQUIREMENT (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



You must know how to personally build, implement, and troubleshoot automation systems.



This is not a “manage a developer” role.



You are expected to:

	•	Build workflows yourself

	•	Fix issues yourself

	•	Improve systems continuously





PRIOR EXECUTIVE EXPERIENCE (REQUIRED)



This role requires prior senior leadership experience, such as:

	•	Operations Director

	•	Head of Operations

	•	Senior Operations Manager

	•	Business Operations Lead

	•	COO / Deputy Operations



You must demonstrate measurable improvements in:

	•	Organization

	•	Profitability

	•	Team performance

	•	Systems efficiency

	•	Revenue or contract growth





CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



1) KPI OWNERSHIP & EXECUTION

	•	Own company KPIs across:

	•	Sales

	•	Marketing

	•	Operations

	•	Run structured weekly performance meetings

	•	Identify bottlenecks and underperformance

	•	Take immediate corrective action

	•	Deliver executive KPI reports including:

	•	Metrics

	•	Gaps

	•	Root causes

	•	Action plans





2) OPERATIONS, SYSTEMS & AUTOMATION (BUILD + OWN)



You are responsible for the entire automation and systems infrastructure.



Platforms include:

	•	GoHighLevel

	•	Zapier

	•	Additional tools such as Make (formerly Integromat) or n8n (strongly preferred)





You will:



BUILD (Hands-On)

	•	Design and build automation workflows from scratch

	•	Create multi-step logic including:

	•	Filters

	•	Paths

	•	Conditions

	•	Webhooks

	•	Build lead routing, tagging, and assignment systems

	•	Build follow-up automation 
, SMS, tasking)

	•	Build deduplication logic before CRM entry





MANAGE & OPTIMIZE

	•	Maintain and improve all workflows

	•	Monitor for failures, delays, and data issues

	•	Optimize for:

	•	Speed

	•	Accuracy

	•	Cost efficiency

	•	Eliminate manual work wherever possible





SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE

	•	Design scalable systems that support:

	•	High-volume lead flow

	•	Multi-location operations

	•	Multiple service lines (cleaning + staffing)

	•	Ensure all systems are:

	•	Documented

	•	Reliable

	•	Easy for the team to follow





TROUBLESHOOTING (CRITICAL)

	•	Identify and fix:

	•	Broken automations

	•	Missing leads

	•	Duplicate data

	•	Sync issues

	•	Implement backup logic and fail-safes





3) TEAM MANAGEMENT & ACCOUNTABILITY

	•	Oversee remote team execution (4–10+ tea
mbers)

	•	Assign tasks and enforce deadlines

	•	Verify completion and output quality

	•	Run daily and weekly check-ins

	•	Maintain performance tracking and documentation



You are not the follow-up person you ensure follow-up happens.





4) PROPOSAL COORDINATION & SUBMISSION



(Not Full Estimating)

	•	Coordinate with estimators to ensure proposals are:

	•	Accurate

	•	Complete

	•	On-time

	•	Professionally packaged

	•	Review:

	•	Scope

	•	Pricing summaries

	•	Compliance documents

	•	Manage:

	•	RFPs

	•	Bid submissions

	•	Vendor portals

	•	Maintain organized records:

	•	COIs

	•	Safety documents

	•	Contracts



5) MARKETING & LEAD FOLLOW-THROUGH

	•	Own all lead follow-up systems inside GHL

	•	Ensure:

	•	No lead is missed

	•	No pipeline is stagnant

	•	Monitor:

	•	Speed to lead

	•	Follow-up compliance

	•	Conversion rates

	•	Ensure all inbound and outbound systems are connected and functioning





6) ADMINISTRATIVE, COMPLIANCE & FINANCIAL SUPPORT

	•	Maintain vendor registrations and compliance deadlines

	•	Track invoicing, payments, and cost summaries

	•	Ensure all submissions are accurate and on time





REQUIRED EXPERIENCE & SKILLS

	•	Advanced experience with GoHighLevel

	•	Strong hands-on experience with Zapier (multi-step workflows, paths, webhooks)

	•	Experience building automation systems (not just using templates)

	•	Experience with Make or n8n (preferred)

	•	Experience with CRM + automation integration across multiple tools

	•	Commercial cleaning, janitorial, facility services, or construction admin background

	•	Proven remote team leadership

	•	Strong organizational and execution skills

	•	Executive-level communication





NOT A FIT IF

	•	You have only used Zapier for basic automations

	•	You cannot build workflows from scratch

	•	You rely fully on developers for technical setup

	•	You do not understand webhooks or data flow

	•	You prefer task-based work vs ownership





FIRST 90-DAY PERFORMANCE METRICS

	•	Fully built and documented automation systems (GHL + Zapier + integrations)

	•	Zero critical lead loss or automation failure

	•	Weekly KPI reporting across all departments

	•	Minimum 5 active proposals submitted weekly

	•	Measurable improvement in:

	•	Lead response time

	•	Pipeline movement

	•	Conversion rates

	•	Documented system improvements and efficiencies





REQUIRED APPLICATION SUBMISSIONS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



1) VIDEO (5–10 MINUTES)



Explain:

	•	Your executive operations experience

	•	How you improved systems and profitability

	•	How you manage teams and accountability





2) 30–60–90 DAY PLAN



Provide:

	•	How you will organize operations

	•	How you will improve systems and automation

	•	How you will measure success





3) PROOF OF RESULTS

	•	Metrics, case studies, or screenshots showing impact





4) AUTOMATION SYSTEM BREAKDOWN (MANDATORY)



Show a real system you built:



Include:

	•	Lead flow (source ? processing ? CRM ? follow-up)

	•	Tools used

	•	Logic structure

	•	How you handled:

	•	Duplicates

	•	Errors

	•	Delays



If you cannot show this, do not apply.



COMPENSATION & GROWTH

	•	Competitive monthly compensation

	•	Performance-based bonuses tied to KPIs

	•	Growth path toward Senior Operations / COO-level leadership







FINAL POSITIONING

title: CRM & Automation Specialist (Close / GoHighLevel / Zapier) — Info Coaching Launches
description:
About the Role:



I run high-ticket coaching and info-product launches ($1,500 to $4,000 offers) using 3-day challenge funnels, VSL funnels, and webinar funnels. I handle marketing, content, offer strategy, client relationships, and managing the sales team myself.



I need someone to own the entire technical backend — the CRM, Zapier automations, Airtable reporting, Slack notifications, and the sales process plumbing that holds it all together.



You are NOT managing people. You are NOT training the sales team. You are NOT doing marketing. You are building, connecting, and maintaining the systems the team runs on.



Multiple launches coming up in the next 2 to 3 months, with at least 1 to 2 clients likely to continue long-term. Plenty of runway for the right person.







What You'll Actually Do:



1. CRM Build-Out (Close CRM or GoHighLevel)



- Full pipeline from scratch: Registered, Showed Up, Applied, Call Booked, Closed Mid-Ticket, Closed High-Ticket, No-Show, Dead



- Opportunity tags ($1,500 vs $4,000), source tags (IG,
, SMS, Webinar, VSL)



- Custom fields, Smart Views per rep, workflows firing on stage changes

Triple-dial cadence with auto-generated tasks (Dial 1, wait 5 min, Dial 2, wait 15 min, Dial 3, auto-SMS, next-day task)







2. Zapier Automations (25 to 30 zaps)



- Typeform registration to CRM contact plus tag plus Slack #leads ping



- WebinarJam attended to CRM stage updates per day



- Calendly booking to Slack #bookings plus warming sequence plus 24h/2h/30min reminders



- Fanbasis/Whop successful payment to Slack #wins plus onboarding plus 
 invite plus Whop access



- Failed payment to Slack #failed-payments plus closer task within 30 min



- Speed-to-lead alert (lead unworked over 5 min triggers Slack DM to dialer)



- No-show recovery, dispute handling, partial Typeform abandonment recovery



- EOD Airtable form submitted to auto-summary in Slack







3. Airtable Accountability Systems





- EOD report forms for dialers, closers, and DM setters



- Tracks dials, connects, sets, shows, pitches, closes, revenue, AOV



- Flows into Slack and feeds dashboards







4. Slack Operations Hub (15 to 20 channels with automated feeds)



#announcements, #leads, #bookings, #wins, #kpis, #successful-payments, #failed-payments, #no-shows, #post-call-notes, #qualified-applications, #free-course-opt-ins, #canceled-calls, #disputes-resolution, #selfie-video-requests, #dialer-eod-reports, #closer-eod-reports, #setter-eod-reports





5.
 and SMS Sequence Setup (ConvertKit and SendBlue)

I write the copy — you load it and set the trigger rules:





- Pre-challenge reminder sequences (6 weeks of hype)



- Post-challenge sequences (4 buckets based on lead behavior)



- Follow-up, nurture flows, and existing list broadcasts







6. Notion Documentation

Document the backend systems you build (CRM flow, Zap logic, Airtable process, troubleshooting guide). You're NOT writing sales scripts — that's on me.







What You Will NOT Be Doing

This role is 100% technical backend. You will not be:





- Managing or training the sales team



- Doing marketing, content, or ad work



- Writing sales scripts or SOPs for reps



- Running calls or talking to leads





Pure systems work — build it, connect it, test it, maintain it, fix it when it breaks.





Tools You Must Know

Expert-level required:





- Close CRM or GoHighLevel



- Zapier (multi-step, filters, paths, webhooks)





Solid hands-on required:

Typeform, Calendly, WebinarJam, ConvertKit, SendBlue, Airtable, Slack







Requirements



- Minimum 1 year in sales ops or CRM automation specifically for info products, online coaching, or high-ticket consulting (NOT e-commerce, NOT SaaS, NOT real estate)





- Built at least 2 CRM pipelines from scratch





- Built 15 plus multi-step Zaps with filters and branching logic





- Understand dialer/closer/setter workflows, triple-dialing, and speed-to-lead





4 plus hours/day overlap with US Eastern Time (9 AM to 9 PM ET)

Can start this week









Do Not Apply If You Are:





- A generic virtual assistant



- A Zapier freelancer who has never worked with a sales team



- A marketer or funnel builder



- A beginner planning to learn Close or GoHighLevel on my dime









Compensation and Structure:



Paid 2-week trial: $500 to $750 flat for first launch backend build



If trial goes well: Monthly retainer of $1,500 to $2,000/month for ongoing builds and maintenance

Multiple launches coming up with 1 to 2 clients likely long-term



Paid weekly via Wise, Payoneer, or PayPal





Hours:

30 to 40 hours/week during trial and active launches. Reduced maintenance hours between launches. Must overlap 4 plus hours/day with US Eastern Time.





Start Date:

Immediately — this week. First launch backend must be live and tested within 2 weeks.





How to Apply — All 6 Required:

Applications missing any of these will be automatically rejected.





1. Loom walkthrough (5 to 10 min) of a real Close CRM or GoHighLevel pipeline you built from scratch — show stages, tags, Smart Views, and workflows



2. Screenshot or Loom of a real multi-step Zapier zap with filters and at least one branching path, with explanation



3. One info-coaching launch you have worked on — offer, your role, what you built (NDAs okay, just describe)



4. Your rates — trial rate AND monthly retainer rate



5. Your time zone and daily ET overlap



6. Answer in 2 to 3 sentences: What is a triple-dial cadence, how do you build it in a CRM, and why does it matter for speed-to-lead?



I'm not reading text-only applications. Send the Loom — I need to see the actual work.

title: Strategic Video Clipper — 60,000 PHP/Month
description:
BENEFITS

nts

HOW TO APPLY

title: Digital Marketing Coordinator (Remote, Part-Time ? Full-Time)
description:
## About the Role



We're a portfolio of small businesses based in British Columbia, Canada spanning financial services, equipment rental, and local media. We're looking for a sharp, versatile Digital Marketing Coordinator to support marketing, content, and community operations across all three businesses.



This is not a typical VA role. You'll be working alongside AI-powered tools and agents that handle content drafting, research, and data analysis. Your job is the human layer — the outreach, the design polish, the community engagement, the ad optimization, and the creative judgment that AI can't replace. You'll be the person who takes good AI-generated drafts and makes them great, who builds real relationships with partners and audiences, and who keeps the marketing engine running smoothly across multiple brands.



We're looking for someone who genuinely understands marketing — not just execution, but strategy. Someone who can look at a campaign and tell us what's working and what isn't, and who takes initiative rather than waiting to be told what to do next.



EXCEPTIONAL WORK GETS REWARDED — WE OFFER PERFORMANCE BONUSES FOR TEA
MBERS WHO CONSISTENTLY GO ABOVE AND BEYOND AND DELIVER REAL RESULTS.



## What You'll Be Doing



**Content & Design**

- Create and refine social media graphics, ad creatives, thumbnails, and marketing materials in Canva (or similar tools)

- Edit short-form video content for social platforms (Reels, Shorts, TikTok-style clips) using CapCut, Premiere, or similar

- Polish and format blog posts, newsletters, and marketing
s

- Maintain brand consistency across all visual outputs for multiple brands

- Create presentation decks and simple PDF reports when needed



**Advertising & Campaigns**

- Set up, manage, and optimize
/Instagram ad campaigns

- Monitor ad performance, adjust targeting, budgets, and creatives based on results

- Run A/B tests on ad copy, images, and audiences

- Provide regular reporting on campaign metrics with actionable insights

- Experience with Google Ads is a plus but not required



**Outreach & Relationship Building**

- Research and reach out to potential podcast guests, partners, and collaborators

- Send personalized outreach
s (not templates — real, thoughtful outreach)

- Follow up professionally and manage ongoing communication threads

- Coordinate with local businesses for advertising, sponsorships, and partnerships

- Build and maintain a contact database of media contacts, partners, and prospects



**Community & Social Media**

- Moderate
 groups and social media communities (respond to comments, flag issues, keep conversations positive)

- Schedule and publish social media content across platforms

- Monitor engagement and surface trends, popular topics, and community feedback

- Grow community membership through organic engagement strategies



**Operations Support**

- Upload and format content in WordPress

- Manage newsletter sends via Beehiiv or similar platforms

- Organize files, assets, and project trackers

- Coordinate with the team on priorities and deadlines



## What We're Looking For



**Required:**

- 2+ years of hands-on digital marketing experience (not just social media posting — actual campaign strategy and execution)

- Strong Canva skills — you can create professional-looking graphics quickly, not just use templates

- Video editing capability — at minimum short-form social video (CapCut, Premiere Rush, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

-
/Meta Ads Manager experience — you've run campaigns, managed budgets, and optimized for results

- Excellent written English — your outreach
s and social copy need to sound natural, professional, and human

- Self-starter mentality — you manage your own time, flag problems proactively, and don't need to be micromanaged

- Comfortable working with AI tools — you'll be collaborating with AI systems daily and need to be adaptable



**Strongly Preferred:**

- Experience with WordPress (uploading posts, basic page edits)

- Newsletter platform experience (Beehiiv, Mailchimp, ConvertKit, or similar)

- Understanding of SEO fundamentals (keywords, meta descriptions, internal linking)

- Google Ads experience

- Podcast production or guest coordination experience

- Basic understanding of analytics (Google Analytics, Meta Insights, UTM tracking)



**Bonus Points:**

- Figma or Adobe Creative Suite skills

- Experience working with multiple brands or businesses simultaneously

- Background in local media, real estate, financial services, or small business marketing

- Photography or original content creation ability

- Familiarity with CRM tools (HubSpot, etc.)



## Working Arrangement



- **Start:** Part-time, 20 hours/week

- **Growth:** Opportunity to expand to full-time based on performance and mutual fit

- **Schedule:** Flexible hours with some overlap required during Pacific Time (PT) business hours for communication

- **Communication:** Slack or similar for daily communication, weekly video check-in

- **Trial:** Initial 2-week paid trial period to ensure mutual fit



## How to Apply



Please include in your proposal:



1. A brief intro about your marketing experience — specifically, tell us about a campaign you managed and what results you achieved

2. Links to 2-3 examples of your design work (Canva graphics, social posts, ad creatives, video edits — whatever shows your best work)

3. Your experience with
/Meta ads — have you managed budgets? What was the largest monthly spend you've handled?

4. Your hourly rate in USD

5. Your typical availability (hours per day, days per week, timezone)



**Please do NOT send a generic proposal.** We will ignore copy-paste applications. Show us you actually read this posting and tell us why you're a good fit for this specific role.



We're building something exciting and want someone who's genuinely good at what they do, not just checking boxes. If you're the kind of person who sees a brand's social media and immediately thinks "I'd do this differently" — we want to hear from you.

description:

ABOUT US

eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

title: QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise & Goflow Expert: Full Charge Bookkeeper (Part-Time)
description:
Hours: Part-Time (20 Hours/Week | 4 Hours/Day)

Schedule: Preferred overlap with US EST Business Hours (e.g., 8:00 PM – 12:00 AM PHT), with some flexibility.

Compensation: $8.00 – $12.00 USD / hour (Depending on Goflow/QuickBooks Desktop experience).



Job Summary



We are seeking a highly skilled Full Charge Bookkeeper to manage our US-based company’s entire accounting cycle and inventory systems. The ideal candidate is an expert in QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise and has hands-on experience with Goflow. You will be responsible for financial accuracy, inventory reconciliation, and professional communication with US vendors and customers to resolve A/P and A/R discrepancies.



Key Responsibilities:



• Full-Cycle Accounting: Maintain the general ledger, perform bank/merchant reconciliations, and execute month-end and year-end closing procedures in QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise.

• Inventory & Goflow Management: Manage data synchronization between Goflow and QuickBooks. Track stock levels, reconcile physical counts, and perform Excel-based data analysis for accurate COGS reporting.

• A/P & A/R (AP/AR) Liaison: Proactively resolve billing discrepancies with vendors and conduct professional collection outreach to customers via
 and scheduled calls.

• Reporting: Prepare monthly financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet) and cash flow reports for management.



Required Skills & Qualifications:



• Technical Skills:

•• Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise is mandatory.

•• High-level Microsoft Excel skills (VLOOKUPs, Pivot Tables).

•• Prior experience with Goflow or similar multi-channel inventory platforms (e.g., Cin7, Fishbowl).



• Experience: 5+ years of Full Charge Bookkeeping for US-based e-commerce or product businesses.

• Communication: Exceptional verbal and written English; proven experience in US Vendor Management and diplomatic customer collections.

• Education: Bachelor’s degree in Accountancy or Finance (CPA preferred).





Compensation & Benefits:



• Trial Period: Position begins with a 3-month (90-day) probationary period.

• Post-Probation "Gold Standard" Benefits (After 3 Months):

• • 13th-Month Pay: Accrual begins upon successful regularization.

• • Monthly Health Insurance (HMO) Allowance.

• • Internet & Utility Stipend: To support your home office setup.

• • Paid Time Off (PTO): Accrual begins after 6 months of service.

• Growth Potential: This role is intended to grow into a full-time (40 hours/week) position as the business scales.



How to Apply:



To be considered for this position, please follow these instructions carefully:



1. Use the subject line: "QuickBooks Expert – [Your Name] – GOFLOW".

2. Attach a link to your updated OnlineJobs.ph profile.

3. Briefly describe your experience managing inventory between Goflow and QuickBooks Desktop.



Note: Applications without the secret word "GOFLOW" in the subject line will be automatically disqualified.

title: Strategic Video Clipper — 60,000 PHP/Month
description:
BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 7.5 hours/day

- Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM (Philippine Time)

- 60,000 PHP/month after the first month + performance-based bonuses

- 40,000 PHP during the first (test) month

- Paid every two weeks via Wise

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs
